## Aliyun ROS RDS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as RDS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-rds';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.Accounts

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.Accounts.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.Accounts.attr_account_names
documentation: Attribute AccountNames: The list of The RDS account names.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.Accounts.attr_accounts
documentation: Attribute Accounts: The list of The RDS accounts.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::RDS::Accounts`, which is used to query the information about database accounts of an ApsaraDB RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosAccounts\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-rds-accounts>

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.AccountsProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Accounts`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-rds-accounts>

```
param db_instance_id

Property dbInstanceId: The ID of the RDS instance.

param account_name

Property accountName: The name of the RDS account.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.AccountsProps.db_instance_id
documentation: Property dbInstanceId: The ID of the RDS instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.AccountsProps.account_name
documentation: Property accountName: The name of the RDS account.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.AccountsProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_account_max_quantity
documentation: Attribute AccountMaxQuantity: The maximum number of accounts that can be created on the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_advanced_features
documentation:
Attribute AdvancedFeatures: The advanced features that are enabled for the instance.

If multiple advanced features are enabled, the advanced features are separated by commas (,). This parameter is available only to instances that run SQL Server. Valid values:
LinkedServer
DistributeTransaction

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_auto_upgrade_minor_version
documentation:
Attribute AutoUpgradeMinorVersion: The method that is used to update the minor engine version of the instance.

Valid values:
Auto: automatic update.
Manual: manual update. The minor engine version of the instance is forcefully updated only when the in-use minor engine version is phased out.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_availability_value
documentation: Attribute AvailabilityValue: The availability status of the instance in percentage.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_babelfish_config
documentation: Attribute BabelfishConfig: The configuration of the Babelfish feature for the ApsaraDB RDS for PostgreSQL instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_category
documentation:
Attribute Category: The RDS edition of the instance.

Valid values:
Basic: RDS Basic Edition
HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition
cluster: RDS Cluster Edition for ApsaraDB RDS for MySQL
AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition for ApsaraDB RDS for SQL Server
Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition
Serverless_basic: RDS Basic Edition for serverless instances

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_collation
documentation: Attribute Collation: The character set collation of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_connection_mode
documentation:
Attribute ConnectionMode: The connection mode of the instance.

Valid values:
Standard: standard mode
Safe: database proxy mode

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_connection_string
documentation: Attribute ConnectionString: The internal endpoint of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_console_version
documentation:
Attribute ConsoleVersion: The type of the proxy that is used by the instance.

Valid values:
1: shared proxy
2: dedicated proxy

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_creation_time
documentation:
Attribute CreationTime: The creation time.

The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format. The time is displayed in UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_current_kernel_version
documentation: Attribute CurrentKernelVersion: The minor engine version of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_cluster_nodes
documentation: Attribute DBClusterNodes: The information about the node in the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_class
documentation: Attribute DBInstanceClass: The instance type of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_class_type
documentation:
Attribute DBInstanceClassType: The instance family to which the instance belongs.

Valid values:
s: shared instance family
x: general-purpose instance family
d: dedicated instance family
h: dedicated host instance family

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_cpu
documentation: Attribute DBInstanceCPU: The number of CPU cores.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_description
documentation: Attribute DBInstanceDescription: The description of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_disk_used
documentation: Attribute DBInstanceDiskUsed: The disk usage of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_id
documentation: Attribute DBInstanceId: The instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_memory
documentation:
Attribute DBInstanceMemory: The memory capacity of the instance.

Unit: MB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_net_type
documentation:
Attribute DBInstanceNetType: The type of the network over which the instance is connected.

Valid values:
Internet: Internet
Intranet: internal network

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_status
documentation: Attribute DBInstanceStatus: The status of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_storage
documentation:
Attribute DBInstanceStorage: The storage capacity of the instance.

Unit: GB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_storage_type
documentation:
Attribute DBInstanceStorageType: The storage type of the instance.

Valid values:
local_ssd and ephemeral_ssd: local SSD
cloud_ssd: standard SSD
cloud_essd: enhanced SSD (ESSD)

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_instance_type
documentation:
Attribute DBInstanceType: The type of the instance.

Valid values:
Primary: primary instance
Readonly: read-only instance
Guard: disaster recovery instance
Temp: temporary instance

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_db_max_quantity
documentation: Attribute DBMaxQuantity: The maximum number of databases that can be created on the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_dedicated_host_group_id
documentation: Attribute DedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the dedicated cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_deletion_protection
documentation:
Attribute DeletionProtection: Indicates whether the release protection feature is enabled.

Valid values:
true
false

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_engine
documentation:
Attribute Engine: The database engine of the instance.

Valid values:
MySQL
PostgreSQL
SQLServer
MariaDB

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_engine_version
documentation: Attribute EngineVersion: The database engine version.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_expire_time
documentation:
Attribute ExpireTime: The expiration time.

The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format. The time is displayed in UTC.
Note: Pay-as-you-go instances never expire.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_extra
documentation: Attribute Extra: The extended information of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_general_group_name
documentation:
Attribute GeneralGroupName: The name of the dedicated cluster to which the instance belongs.

This parameter is returned only when the instance is created in an ApsaraDB MyBase cluster that runs MySQL on Standard Edition.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_guard_db_instance_id
documentation: Attribute GuardDBInstanceId: The ID of the disaster recovery instance that is attached to the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_increment_source_db_instance_id
documentation:
Attribute IncrementSourceDBInstanceId: The ID of the instance from which incremental data comes.

The incremental data of a disaster recovery instance or read-only instance comes from its primary instance. If this parameter is not returned, the instance is a primary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_instance_network_type
documentation:
Attribute InstanceNetworkType: The network type of the instance.

Valid values:
Classic
VPC

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_instruction_set_arch
documentation:
Attribute InstructionSetArch: The architecture type of the instance.

Valid values:
x86
arm

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_ip_type
documentation:
Attribute IPType: The type of the IP address.

Only IPv4 addresses are supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_latest_kernel_version
documentation: Attribute LatestKernelVersion: The latest minor engine version that is supported by the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_lock_mode
documentation:
Attribute LockMode: The lock mode of the instance.

Valid values:
Unlock: The instance is not locked.
ManualLock: The instance is manually locked.
LockByExpiration: The instance is automatically locked due to instance expiration.
LockByRestoration: The instance is automatically locked due to instance restoration.
LockByDiskQuota: The instance is automatically locked due to exhausted storage space.
LockReadInstanceByDiskQuota: The instance is a read-only instance and is automatically locked due to exhausted storage.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_lock_reason
documentation: Attribute LockReason: The reason why the instance was locked.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_maintain_time
documentation:
Attribute MaintainTime: The maintenance window of the instance.

The time is displayed in UTC. Take note that the maintenance window displayed in the ApsaraDB RDS console is equal to the value of this parameter plus 8 hours.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_master_instance_id
documentation:
Attribute MasterInstanceId: The ID of the primary instance.

Note: If this parameter is not returned, the instance is the primary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_master_zone
documentation: Attribute MasterZone: The zone ID of the primary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_max_connections
documentation: Attribute MaxConnections: The maximum number of concurrent connections.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_max_iombps
documentation:
Attribute MaxIOMBPS: The maximum I/O throughput.

Unit: MB/s.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_max_iops
documentation: Attribute MaxIOPS: The maximum number of I/O requests per second.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_pay_type
documentation:
Attribute PayType: The billing method of the instance.

Valid values:
Postpaid: pay-as-you-go
Prepaid: subscription

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_pg_bouncer_enabled
documentation: Attribute PGBouncerEnabled: Indicates whether PgBouncer is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_port
documentation: Attribute Port: The port that is used to connect to the instance over an internal network.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_proxy_type
documentation:
Attribute ProxyType: The type of the proxy that is supported by the instance.

Valid values:
0: The instance does not support database proxies.
1: The instance supports shared proxies, with which the instance runs in multi-tenant mode.
2: The instance supports dedicated proxies, with which the instance runs in single-tenant mode.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_read_only_db_instance_ids
documentation: Attribute ReadOnlyDBInstanceIds: The IDs of the read-only instances that are attached to the primary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_readonly_instance_sql_delayed_time
documentation:
Attribute ReadonlyInstanceSQLDelayedTime: The latency at which the system replicates data to read-only instances.

The system replicates data from the primary instance to the read-only instances at the latency that is specified by the ReadonlyInstanceSQLDelayedTime parameter. Unit: seconds.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_resource_group_id
documentation: Attribute ResourceGroupId: The resource group ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_security_ip_list
documentation: Attribute SecurityIPList: The IP addresses in the IP address whitelist.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_security_ip_mode
documentation:
Attribute SecurityIPMode: The whitelist mode of the instance.

Valid values:
normal: standard whitelist mode
safety: enhanced whitelist mode

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_serverless_config
documentation: Attribute ServerlessConfig: The settings of the serverless instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_slave_zones
documentation: Attribute SlaveZones: The information about the zone of the secondary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_super_permission_mode
documentation:
Attribute SuperPermissionMode: Indicates whether the instance supports superuser accounts, such as the system administrator (SA) account, the Active Directory (AD) account, and the host account.

Enable
Disabled

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_temp_db_instance_id
documentation: Attribute TempDBInstanceId: The ID of the temporary instance that is attached to the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_time_zone
documentation: Attribute TimeZone: The time zone of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_tips
documentation:
Attribute Tips: The information about the exception that is detected on the instance.

This parameter is returned only when the instance is created in an ApsaraDB MyBase cluster that runs MySQL on Standard Edition.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_tips_level
documentation:
Attribute TipsLevel: The severity level of the exception that is detected on the instance.

This parameter is returned only when the instance is created in an ApsaraDB MyBase cluster that runs MySQL on Standard Edition. Valid values:
1: The instance is normal.
2: The specifications of the read-only instances do not match the specifications of the primary instance. You must adjust the specifications of these instances based on your business requirements.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_vpc_cloud_instance_id
documentation: Attribute VpcCloudInstanceId: The VPC ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_vpc_id
documentation: Attribute VpcId: The virtual private cloud (VPC) ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_v_switch_id
documentation: Attribute VSwitchId: The vSwitch ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstance.attr_zone_id
documentation: Attribute ZoneId: The zone ID.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::RDS::DBInstance`, which is used to query an ApsaraDB RDS instance.

```

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDBInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-rds-dbinstance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.DBInstancesProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `DBInstances`.

```
param connection_mode

Property connectionMode: The connection mode of the instance.

param connection_string

Property connectionString: The endpoint of the instance.

param db_instance_class

Property dbInstanceClass: The instance type of the instances.

param db_instance_id

Property dbInstanceId: The ID of the instance.

param db_instance_status

Property dbInstanceStatus: The status of the instances.

param db_instance_type

Property dbInstanceType: The role of the instances.

param dedicated_host_group_id

Property dedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the dedicated cluster to which the instances belong.

param dedicated_host_id

Property dedicatedHostId: The ID of the host to which the instances belong in the specified dedicated cluster.

param engine

Property engine: The database engine that is run by the instances.

param engine_version

Property engineVersion: The version of the database engine that is run by the instances.

param expired

Property expired: Specifies whether the instances have expired.

param instance_level

Property instanceLevel: Specifies whether to return the RDS editions of the instances by using the Category parameter.

param instance_network_type

Property instanceNetworkType: The network type of the instances.

param pay_type

Property payType: The billing method of the instances.

param proxy_id

Property proxyId: The ID of the proxy mode.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group to which the instances belong.

param search_key

Property searchKey: The keywords that are contained in the IDs or descriptions of the instances.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: The ID of the virtual private cloud (VPC) to which the instances belong.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: The ID of the vSwitch that is associated with the specified VPC.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: The ID of the zone to which the instances belong.
```

:Attribute:

AdvancedFeatures: The advanced features that are enabled for the instance. If multiple advanced features are enabled, the advanced features are separated by commas (,). This parameter is available only to instances that run SQL Server. Valid values:
LinkedServer
DistributeTransaction

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_auto_upgrade_minor_version
documentation:
:Attribute:

AutoUpgradeMinorVersion: The method that is used to update the minor engine version of the instance. Valid values:
Auto: automatic update.
Manual: manual update. The minor engine version of the instance is forcefully updated only when the in-use minor engine version is phased out.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_availability_value

Category: The RDS edition of the instance. Valid values:
Basic: RDS Basic Edition
HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition
cluster: RDS Cluster Edition for ApsaraDB RDS for MySQL
AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition for ApsaraDB RDS for SQL Server
Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition
Serverless_basic: RDS Basic Edition for serverless instances

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_collation

2: dedicated proxy

documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceDescription: The description of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_disk_used
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceDiskUsed: The disk usage of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceId: The instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_memory
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceMemory: The memory capacity of the instance. Unit: MB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_net_type
documentation:
:Attribute:

DBInstanceNetType: The type of the network over which the instance is connected. Valid values:
Internet: Internet
Intranet: internal network

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_status
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceStatus: The status of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_storage
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceStorage: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: GB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_storage_type
documentation:
:Attribute:

DBInstanceStorageType: The storage type of the instance. Valid values:
local_ssd and ephemeral_ssd: local SSD
cloud_ssd: standard SSD
cloud_essd: enhanced SSD (ESSD)

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_type
documentation:
:Attribute:

DBInstanceType: The type of the instance. Valid values:
Primary: primary instance
Readonly: read-only instance
Guard: disaster recovery instance
Temp: temporary instance

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_db_max_quantity
documentation: :Attribute: DBMaxQuantity: The maximum number of databases that can be created on the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_dedicated_host_group_id
documentation: :Attribute: DedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the dedicated cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_deletion_protection
documentation:
:Attribute:

DeletionProtection: Indicates whether the release protection feature is enabled. Valid values:
true
false

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_engine
documentation:
:Attribute:

Engine: The database engine of the instance. Valid values:
MySQL
PostgreSQL
SQLServer
MariaDB

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_engine_version
documentation: :Attribute: EngineVersion: The database engine version.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_expire_time
documentation:
:Attribute:

ExpireTime: The expiration time. The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format. The time is displayed in UTC.
Note: Pay-as-you-go instances never expire.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_extra
documentation: :Attribute: Extra: The extended information of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_general_group_name
documentation: :Attribute: GeneralGroupName: The name of the dedicated cluster to which the instance belongs. This parameter is returned only when the instance is created in an ApsaraDB MyBase cluster that runs MySQL on Standard Edition.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_guard_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: GuardDBInstanceId: The ID of the disaster recovery instance that is attached to the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_increment_source_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: IncrementSourceDBInstanceId: The ID of the instance from which incremental data comes. The incremental data of a disaster recovery instance or read-only instance comes from its primary instance. If this parameter is not returned, the instance is a primary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_instance_network_type
documentation:
:Attribute:

InstanceNetworkType: The network type of the instance. Valid values:
Classic
VPC

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_instruction_set_arch
documentation:
:Attribute:

InstructionSetArch: The architecture type of the instance. Valid values:
x86
arm

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_ip_type
documentation: :Attribute: IPType: The type of the IP address. Only IPv4 addresses are supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_latest_kernel_version
documentation: :Attribute: LatestKernelVersion: The latest minor engine version that is supported by the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_lock_mode
documentation:
:Attribute:

LockMode: The lock mode of the instance. Valid values:
Unlock: The instance is not locked.
ManualLock: The instance is manually locked.
LockByExpiration: The instance is automatically locked due to instance expiration.
LockByRestoration: The instance is automatically locked due to instance restoration.
LockByDiskQuota: The instance is automatically locked due to exhausted storage space.
LockReadInstanceByDiskQuota: The instance is a read-only instance and is automatically locked due to exhausted storage.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_lock_reason
documentation: :Attribute: LockReason: The reason why the instance was locked.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_maintain_time
documentation: :Attribute: MaintainTime: The maintenance window of the instance. The time is displayed in UTC. Take note that the maintenance window displayed in the ApsaraDB RDS console is equal to the value of this parameter plus 8 hours.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_master_instance_id
documentation:
:Attribute:

MasterInstanceId: The ID of the primary instance.
Note: If this parameter is not returned, the instance is the primary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_master_zone
documentation: :Attribute: MasterZone: The zone ID of the primary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_max_connections
documentation: :Attribute: MaxConnections: The maximum number of concurrent connections.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_max_iombps
documentation: :Attribute: MaxIOMBPS: The maximum I/O throughput. Unit: MB/s.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_max_iops
documentation: :Attribute: MaxIOPS: The maximum number of I/O requests per second.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_pay_type
documentation:
:Attribute:

PayType: The billing method of the instance. Valid values:
Postpaid: pay-as-you-go
Prepaid: subscription

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_pg_bouncer_enabled
documentation: :Attribute: PGBouncerEnabled: Indicates whether PgBouncer is enabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_port
documentation: :Attribute: Port: The port that is used to connect to the instance over an internal network.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_proxy_type
documentation:
:Attribute:

ProxyType: The type of the proxy that is supported by the instance. Valid values:
0: The instance does not support database proxies.
1: The instance supports shared proxies, with which the instance runs in multi-tenant mode.
2: The instance supports dedicated proxies, with which the instance runs in single-tenant mode.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_read_only_db_instance_ids
documentation: :Attribute: ReadOnlyDBInstanceIds: The IDs of the read-only instances that are attached to the primary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_readonly_instance_sql_delayed_time
documentation: :Attribute: ReadonlyInstanceSQLDelayedTime: The latency at which the system replicates data to read-only instances. The system replicates data from the primary instance to the read-only instances at the latency that is specified by the ReadonlyInstanceSQLDelayedTime parameter. Unit: seconds.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_resource_group_id
documentation: :Attribute: ResourceGroupId: The resource group ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_security_ip_list
documentation: :Attribute: SecurityIPList: The IP addresses in the IP address whitelist.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_security_ip_mode
documentation:
:Attribute:

SecurityIPMode: The whitelist mode of the instance. Valid values:
normal: standard whitelist mode
safety: enhanced whitelist mode

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_serverless_config
documentation: :Attribute: ServerlessConfig: The settings of the serverless instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_slave_zones
documentation: :Attribute: SlaveZones: The information about the zone of the secondary instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_super_permission_mode
documentation:
:Attribute:

SuperPermissionMode: Indicates whether the instance supports superuser accounts, such as the system administrator (SA) account, the Active Directory (AD) account, and the host account.
Enable
Disabled

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_temp_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: TempDBInstanceId: The ID of the temporary instance that is attached to the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_time_zone
documentation: :Attribute: TimeZone: The time zone of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_tips
documentation: :Attribute: Tips: The information about the exception that is detected on the instance. This parameter is returned only when the instance is created in an ApsaraDB MyBase cluster that runs MySQL on Standard Edition.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_tips_level
documentation:
:Attribute:

TipsLevel: The severity level of the exception that is detected on the instance. This parameter is returned only when the instance is created in an ApsaraDB MyBase cluster that runs MySQL on Standard Edition. Valid values:
1: The instance is normal.
2: The specifications of the read-only instances do not match the specifications of the primary instance. You must adjust the specifications of these instances based on your business requirements.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_vpc_cloud_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: VpcCloudInstanceId: The VPC ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_vpc_id
documentation: :Attribute: VpcId: The virtual private cloud (VPC) ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_v_switch_id
documentation: :Attribute: VSwitchId: The vSwitch ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.RosDBInstance.attr_zone_id
documentation: :Attribute: ZoneId: The zone ID.

documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: The ID of the instance.

documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::RDS::DBInstance`, which is used to query an ApsaraDB RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DBInstance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-rds-dbinstance>

If the instance spans more than one zone, the value of this parameter contains an MAZ part,such as cn-hangzhou-MAZ6(b,f) and cn-hangzhou-MAZ5(b,e,f)

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::RDS::Zones`, which is used to query the zones of an ApsaraDB RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Zones` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-rds-zones>

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.datasource.ZonesProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Zones`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-rds-zones>

```
param engine

Property engine: The database engine that is run by the instance.

param category

Property category: The RDS edition of the instance. Valid values: Basic: RDS Basic Edition HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition

param commodity_code

Property commodityCode: The commodity code of the instance.

param dispense_mode

Property dispenseMode: Specifies whether to return the zones in which the single-zone deployment method is supported. Valid values: 1: returns the zones. 0: does not return the zones. Default value: 0.

param engine_version

Property engineVersion: The version of the database engine that is run by the instance.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: The ID of the zone in which the instance is located. If the instance spans more than one zone, the value of this parameter contains an MAZ part,such as cn-hangzhou-MAZ6(b,f) and cn-hangzhou-MAZ5(b,e,f)
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.AccountProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Account`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-account>

```
param account_name

Property accountName: Account name, which must be unique and meet the following requirements: Start with a letter; Consist of lower-case letters, digits, and underscores (_); Length: MySQL 8.0 and 5.7: 2-32 characters. MySQL 5.6、MariaDB and PostgreSQL Local version: 2-16 characters. SQL Server: 2-64 characters. PostgreSQL Cloud version: 2-63 characters.

param account_password

Property accountPassword: The account password for the database instance. It may consist of letters, digits, or underlines, with a length of 8 to 32 characters.

param db_instance_id

Property dbInstanceId: RDS instance ID.

param account_description

Property accountDescription: Account remarks. It cannot begin with http:// or https://. It must start with a Chinese character or English letter. It can include Chinese and English characters/letters, underscores (_), hyphens (-), and digits. The length may be 2-256 characters.

param account_type

Property accountType: Privilege type of account. Normal: Common privilege. Super: High privilege. And the default value is Normal. Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server) This parameter is valid for MySQL 5.5/5.6 only. MySQL 5.7, SQL Server 2012/2016, PostgreSQL, and PPAS each can have only one initial account. Other accounts are created by the initial account that has logged on to the database.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.AccountProps.account_name
documentation:
Property accountName: Account name, which must be unique and meet the following requirements: Start with a letter;

Consist of lower-case letters, digits, and underscores (_);
Length:
MySQL 8.0 and 5.7: 2-32 characters.
MySQL 5.6、MariaDB and PostgreSQL Local version: 2-16 characters.
SQL Server: 2-64 characters.
PostgreSQL Cloud version: 2-63 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.AccountProps.account_password
documentation:
Property accountPassword: The account password for the database instance.

It may consist of letters, digits, or underlines, with a length of 8 to 32 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.AccountProps.db_instance_id
documentation: Property dbInstanceId: RDS instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.AccountProps.account_description
documentation:
Property accountDescription: Account remarks.

It cannot begin with http:// or https://.
It must start with a Chinese character or English letter.
It can include Chinese and English characters/letters, underscores (_), hyphens (-), and digits.
The length may be 2-256 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.AccountProps.account_type
documentation:
Property accountType: Privilege type of account.

Normal: Common privilege.
Super: High privilege. And the default value is Normal.
Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server)
This parameter is valid for MySQL 5.5/5.6 only.
MySQL 5.7, SQL Server 2012/2016, PostgreSQL, and PPAS each can have only one initial account. Other accounts are created by the initial account that has logged on to the database.

```
param db_instance_id

Property dbInstanceId: RDS instance ID.

param port

Property port: The port of the database service.

param babelfish_port

Property babelfishPort: The Tabular Data Stream (TDS) port of the instance for which Babelfish is enabled. Note This parameter applies only to ApsaraDB RDS for PostgreSQL instances. For more information about Babelfish for ApsaraDB RDS for PostgreSQL, see Introduction to Babelfish.

param connection_string_prefix

Property connectionStringPrefix: The prefix of the endpoint. Only the prefix of the CurrentConnectionString parameter value can be modified. The prefix must be 5 to 40 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

param general_group_name

Property generalGroupName: The name of the dedicated cluster to which the instance belongs. This parameter takes effect only when the instance runs MySQL on RDS Standard Edition and is created in a dedicated cluster.

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDBInstanceClone\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-dbinstanceclone>

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.DBInstanceCloneProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `DBInstanceClone`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-dbinstanceclone>

```
param db_instance_id

Property dbInstanceId: Instance id.

param pay_type

Property payType: The charge type of created instance.

param allocate_public_connection

Property allocatePublicConnection: If true, allocate public connection automate.

param backup_id

Property backupId: The ID of the backup set that you want to use. You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the most recent backup set list. Note You must specify at least one of the BackupId and RestoreTime parameters.

param backup_retention_period

Property backupRetentionPeriod: The retention period of the data backup. Value range: 7 to 730. The default value is the original value. Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

param backup_type

Property backupType: The type of backup used by the new instance. Valid values: - FullBackup: full backup - IncrementalBackup: incremental backup

param category

Property category: The edition of the instance. Valid values: Basic: RDS Basic Edition HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition cluster: RDS Cluster Edition AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition for SQL Server Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition serverless_basic: RDS Serverless Basic Edition

param connection_string_prefix

Property connectionStringPrefix: The prefix of the endpoint. Only the prefix of the CurrentConnectionString parameter value can be modified. The prefix must be 8 to 64 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

param connection_string_type

Property connectionStringType: The endpoint type of the instance, allow values: Inner, Public.

param db_instance_class

Property dbInstanceClass: Database instance type. Refer the RDS database instance type reference, such as 'rds.mys2.large', 'rds.mss1.large', 'rds.pg.s1.small' etc

param db_instance_description

Property dbInstanceDescription: Description of created database instance.

param db_instance_storage

Property dbInstanceStorage: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: GB. The storage capacity increases in increments of 5 GB. You can call the DescribeAvailableResource operation to query the storage capacity range that is supported for a specified instance type in a region.

param db_instance_storage_type

Property dbInstanceStorageType: The storage type of the instance. Valid values: local_ssd: specifies to use local SSDs. This is the recommended storage type. cloud_ssd: specifies to use standard SSDs. cloud_essd: enhanced SSD of performance level (PL)1. cloud_essd2: enhanced SSD of PL2. cloud_essd3: enhanced SSD of PL3.

param db_mappings

Property dbMappings: Database mappings to attach to db instance.

param db_names

Property dbNames: The names of the databases that you want to create on the new instance.

param dedicated_host_group_id

Property dedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the host group to which the instance belongs if you create an instance in a host group.

param instance_network_type

Property instanceNetworkType: The network type of the new instance. Valid values: - VPC - Classic The default value is the network type of the original instance.

param maintain_time

Property maintainTime: The period during which the maintenance performs. The format is HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ.

param master_username

Property masterUsername: The master user name for the database instance.

param master_user_password

Property masterUserPassword: The master password for the database instance.

param master_user_type

Property masterUserType: Privilege type of account. Normal: Common privilege. Super: High privilege. Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server) The default value is Normal.

param period

Property period: The subscription duration. Valid values: When PeriodType is Month, it could be from 1 to 12, 24, 36, 48, 60. When PeriodType is Year, it could be from 1 to 5.

param period_type

Property periodType: Charge period for created instances.

param port

Property port: The port of the database service.

param preferred_backup_period

Property preferredBackupPeriod: The backup period. Separate multiple values with commas (,). The default value is the original value. Valid values:Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

param preferred_backup_time

Property preferredBackupTime: The time when the backup task is performed. Format: yyyy-MM-ddZ-HH:mm:ssZ.Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

param private_ip_address

Property privateIpAddress: The private ip for created instance.

param restore_table

Property restoreTable: Specifies whether to restore specific databases and tables. The value 1 specifies to restore specific databases and tables. If you do not want to restore specific databases or tables, you can choose not to specify this parameter.

param restore_time

Property restoreTime: The point in time to which you want to restore the data of the original instance. The point in time must fall within the specified log backup retention period. The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format. The time must be in UTC.

param security_group_id

Property securityGroupId: The ID of the ECS security groups. Each RDS instance can be associated with up to three ECS security groups. You must separate them with commas (,). To delete an ECS Security group, leave this parameter empty.

param security_ip_list

Property securityIpList: Security ip to access the database instance, combine with comma, 0.0.0.0/0 means no limitation.

param slave_zone_ids

Property slaveZoneIds: List of slave zone ids can specify slave zone ids when creating the high-availability or enterprise edition instance. Meanwhile, VSwitchId needs to pass in the corresponding vswitch id to the slave zone by order. For example, ZoneId = "zone-a" and SlaveZoneIds = ["zone-c", "zone-b"], then the VSwitchId must be "vsw-zone-a,vsw-zone-c,vsw-zone-b".

param sql_collector_status

Property sqlCollectorStatus: Specifies whether to enable or disable the SQL Explorer (SQL audit) feature. Valid values:Enable | Disabled.

param ssl_setting

Property sslSetting: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) link setting of the instance. Valid values: Disabled: Disable SSL EnabledForPublicConnection: Public connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate. It requires AllocatePublicConnection is true. EnabledForInnerConnection: Private connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate. Default value is Disabled.

param table_meta

Property tableMeta: The information about the databases and tables that you want to restore.

param tags

Property tags: The tags of an instance. You should input the information of the tag with the format of the Key-Value, such as {"key1":"value1","key2":"value2", ... "key5":"value5"}. At most 20 tags can be specified. Key It can be up to 64 characters in length. Cannot begin with aliyun. Cannot begin with http:// or https://. Cannot be a null string. Value It can be up to 128 characters in length. Cannot begin with aliyun. Cannot begin with http:// or https://. Can be a null string.

param timeout_in_minutes

Property timeoutInMinutes: The timeout period for creating the clone instance resource. Unit: Minute. Default: 120.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: The VPC id of created database instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: The vSwitch id of created instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: selected zone to create database instance. You cannot set the ZoneId parameter if the MultiAZ parameter is set to true.
```

documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::DBInstanceParameterGroup`, which is used to modify the parameters of an ApsaraDB RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDBInstanceParameterGroup\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-dbinstanceparametergroup>
