classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount._render_properties
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount.attr_account_name
documentation: :Attribute: AccountName: Account name

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount.account_name
documentation:
:Property:

accountName: Account name, which must be unique and meet the following requirements:
Start with a letter;
Consist of lower-case letters, digits, and underscores (_);
Length:
MySQL 8.0 and 5.7: 2-32 characters.
MySQL 5.6、MariaDB and PostgreSQL Local version: 2-16 characters.
SQL Server: 2-64 characters.
PostgreSQL Cloud version: 2-63 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount.account_password
documentation: :Property: accountPassword: The account password for the database instance. It may consist of letters, digits, or underlines, with a length of 8 to 32 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: RDS instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount.account_description
documentation:
:Property:

accountDescription: Account remarks.
It cannot begin with http:// or https://.
It must start with a Chinese character or English letter.
It can include Chinese and English characters/letters, underscores (_), hyphens (-), and digits.
The length may be 2-256 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccount.account_type
documentation:
:Property:

accountType: Privilege type of account.
Normal: Common privilege.
Super: High privilege. And the default value is Normal.
Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server)
This parameter is valid for MySQL 5.5/5.6 only.
MySQL 5.7, SQL Server 2012/2016, PostgreSQL, and PPAS each can have only one initial account. Other accounts are created by the initial account that has logged on to the database.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::Account`, which is used to create a database account for an ApsaraDB for RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Account` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-account>

classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountPrivilege

documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'

---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountPrivilege.account_name
documentation: :Property: accountName: RDS account name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountPrivilege.account_privilege
documentation: :Property: accountPrivilege: RDS account privilege. The specified number must be the same as the number of DbName

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountPrivilege.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: RDS instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountPrivilege.db_name
documentation: :Property: dbName: RDS database name. Separate multiple database names with commas (,).

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::AccountPrivilege`, which is used to authorize an account to access a database.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `AccountPrivilege` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-accountprivilege>

param account_privilege



param db_instance_id



param db_name

```

documentation: :Property: accountName: RDS account name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountPrivilegeProps.db_instance_id

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountPrivilegeProps.db_name

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `RosAccount`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-account>

```
param account_name



param account_password



param db_instance_id



param account_description



param account_type

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountProps.account_name
documentation:
:Property:

accountName: Account name, which must be unique and meet the following requirements:
Start with a letter;
Consist of lower-case letters, digits, and underscores (_);
Length:
MySQL 8.0 and 5.7: 2-32 characters.
MySQL 5.6、MariaDB and PostgreSQL Local version: 2-16 characters.
SQL Server: 2-64 characters.
PostgreSQL Cloud version: 2-63 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountProps.account_password
documentation: :Property: accountPassword: The account password for the database instance. It may consist of letters, digits, or underlines, with a length of 8 to 32 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountProps.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: RDS instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountProps.account_description
documentation:
:Property:

accountDescription: Account remarks.
It cannot begin with http:// or https://.
It must start with a Chinese character or English letter.
It can include Chinese and English characters/letters, underscores (_), hyphens (-), and digits.
The length may be 2-256 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosAccountProps.account_type
documentation:
:Property:

accountType: Privilege type of account.
Normal: Common privilege.
Super: High privilege. And the default value is Normal.
Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server)
This parameter is valid for MySQL 5.5/5.6 only.
MySQL 5.7, SQL Server 2012/2016, PostgreSQL, and PPAS each can have only one initial account. Other accounts are created by the initial account that has logged on to the database.

documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

documentation: :Attribute: BabelfishPort: The name of the dedicated cluster to which the instance belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosConnection.attr_connection_string
documentation: :Attribute: ConnectionString: Connection string

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosConnection.attr_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceId: RDS instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosConnection.attr_port
documentation: :Attribute: Port: The port of the database service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosConnection.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: RDS instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosConnection.port
documentation: :Property: port: The port of the database service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosConnection.babelfish_port

:Property:

babelfishPort: The Tabular Data Stream (TDS) port of the instance for which Babelfish is enabled.
Note This parameter applies only to ApsaraDB RDS for PostgreSQL instances.
For more information about Babelfish for ApsaraDB RDS for PostgreSQL, see Introduction to Babelfish.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosConnection.connection_string_prefix
documentation:
:Property:

connectionStringPrefix: The prefix of the endpoint.
Only the prefix of the CurrentConnectionString parameter value can be modified.
The prefix must be 5 to 40 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosConnection.general_group_name
documentation:
:Property:

generalGroupName: The name of the dedicated cluster to which the instance belongs.
This parameter takes effect only when the instance runs MySQL on RDS
Standard Edition and is created in a dedicated cluster.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::Connection`, which is used to apply for a public endpoint.

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Connection` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-connection>

Note This parameter applies only to ApsaraDB RDS for PostgreSQL instances.

classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance._render_properties
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.attr_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceId: The instance id of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.attr_inner_connection_string
documentation: :Attribute: InnerConnectionString: DB instance connection url by Intranet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.attr_inner_ip_address
documentation: :Attribute: InnerIPAddress: IP Address for created DB instance of Intranet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.attr_inner_port
documentation: :Attribute: InnerPort: Intranet port of created DB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.attr_public_connection_string
documentation: :Attribute: PublicConnectionString: DB instance connection url by Internet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.attr_public_ip_address
documentation: :Attribute: PublicIPAddress: IP Address for created DB instance of Internet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.attr_public_port
documentation: :Attribute: PublicPort: Internet port of created DB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_instance_class
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceClass: Database instance type. Refer the RDS database instance type reference, such as 'rds.mys2.large', 'rds.mss1.large', 'rds.pg.s1.small' etc

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_instance_storage
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorage: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: GB. The storage capacity increases in increments of 5 GB.
You can call the DescribeAvailableResource operation to query the storage capacity range that is supported for a specified instance type in a region.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.engine
documentation: :Property: engine: Database instance engine type. Support MySQL/SQLServer/PostgreSQL/PPAS/MariaDB now.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.engine_version
documentation:
:Property:

engineVersion: Database instance version of the relative engine type. Support:
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to MySQL: 5.5, 5.6, 5.7, and 8.0
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to SQL Server: 2008r2, 08r2_ent_ha, 2012, 2012_ent_ha, 2012_std_ha, 2012_web, 2014_std_ha, 2016_ent_ha, 2016_std_ha, 2016_web, 2017_std_ha, 2017_ent, 2019_std_ha, and 2019_ent
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to PostgreSQL: 10.0, 11.0, 12.0, 13.0, and 14.0
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to MariaDB: 10.3

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.security_ip_list
documentation: :Property: securityIpList: Security ip to access the database instance, combine with comma, 0.0.0.0/0 means no limitation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.allocate_public_connection
documentation: :Property: allocatePublicConnection: If true, allocate public connection automate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.archive_backup_keep_count
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupKeepCount: The number of archived backups that can be retained. Default value: 1. Valid values:
The value of this parameter ranges from 1 to 31 when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to ByMonth.
The value of this parameter ranges from 1 to 7 when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to ByWeek.
Note You do not need to specify this parameter when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to KeepAll.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.archive_backup_keep_policy
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupKeepPolicy: The period for which to retain archived backups. The number of archived backups that can
be retained within the specified period is determined by the ArchiveBackupKeepCount parameter.
Default value: 0. Valid values:
ByMonth
ByWeek
KeepAll

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.archive_backup_retention_period
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupRetentionPeriod: The number of days for which to retain archived backups.
The default value 0 specifies not to enable the backup archiving function. Valid values: 30 to 1095.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.auto_renew
documentation:
:Property:

autoRenew: Specifies whether to enable auto-renewal. Valid values: true and false. Note
:Monthly subscription: The auto-renewal cycle is one month.
Annual subscription: The auto-renewal cycle is one year.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.back_up_category
documentation:
:Property:

backUpCategory: Specifies whether to enable the second-level backup function. This function allows a backup
to be completed within seconds. Valid values:
Flash: specifies to enable the second-level backup function.
Standard: specifies to disable the second-level backup function.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.backup_policy_mode
documentation:
:Property:

backupPolicyMode: Backup type,
DataBackupPolicy: data backup
LogBackupPolicy: log backup

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.backup_retention_period
documentation: :Property: backupRetentionPeriod: The retention period of the data backup. Value range: 7 to 730. The default value is the original value. Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.bursting_enabled
documentation: :Property: burstingEnabled: Whether to enable bursting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.category
documentation:
:Property:

category: The edition of the instance. Valid values:
Basic: RDS Basic Edition
HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition
cluster: RDS Cluster Edition
AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition for SQL Server
Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition
serverless_basic: RDS Serverless Basic Edition

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.cold_data_enabled
documentation: :Property: coldDataEnabled: Whether to enable cold data storage.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.compress_type
documentation:
:Property:

compressType: The format used to compress backups. Valid values:
1: The zlib tool is used to compress backups into .tar.gz files.
4: The QuickLZ tool is used to compress backups into .xb.gz files.
This compression format is supported only when the instance runs MySQL 5.6 or 5.7.
It can be used to restore individual databases and tables.
8: The QuickLZ tool is used to compress backups into .xb.gz files.
This compression format is supported only when the instance runs MySQL 8.0.
It cannot be used to restore individual databases or tables.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.connection_mode
documentation: :Property: connectionMode: Connection Mode for database instance,support 'Standard' and 'Safe' mode. Default is RDS system assigns.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.connection_string_prefix
documentation:
:Property:

connectionStringPrefix: The prefix of the endpoint.
Only the prefix of the CurrentConnectionString parameter value can be modified.
The prefix must be 8 to 64 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.connection_string_type
documentation: :Property: connectionStringType: The endpoint type of the instance, allow values: Inner, Public

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_instance_description
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceDescription: Description of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_instance_net_type
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceNetType: Database instance net type, default is Intranet.Internet for public access, Intranet for private access.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_instance_storage_type
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorageType: The storage type of the instance. Valid values:
local_ssd: specifies to use local SSDs. This is the recommended storage type.
cloud_ssd: specifies to use standard SSDs.
cloud_essd: enhanced SSD of performance level (PL)1.
cloud_essd2: enhanced SSD of PL2.
cloud_essd3: enhanced SSD of PL3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_is_ignore_case
documentation:
:Property:

dbIsIgnoreCase: Specifies whether table names are case-sensitive. Valid values:
1: Table names are not case-sensitive. This is the default value.
0: Table names are case-sensitive.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_mappings
documentation: :Property: dbMappings: Database mappings to attach to db instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_param_group_id
documentation: :Property: dbParamGroupId: The ID of the parameter template used by the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.db_time_zone
documentation: :Property: dbTimeZone: The UTC time zone of the instance. Valid values: -12:00 to +12:00. The time zone must be an integer value such as +08:00. Values such as +08:30 are not allowed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.dedicated_host_group_id
documentation: :Property: dedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the host group to which the instance belongs if you create an instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.deletion_protection
documentation: :Property: deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable the release protection feature for the instance. This feature is available only for pay-as-you-go instances. Default is false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.enable_backup_log
documentation:
:Property:

enableBackupLog: Specifies whether to enable the log backup function. Valid values:
True: specifies to enable the log backup function.
False: specifies to disable the log backup function.
Note You must specify this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.encryption_key
documentation: :Property: encryptionKey: The ID of the encryption key that is used to encrypt data on SSDs in the region. You can view the encryption key ID in the Key Management Service (KMS) console. You can also create an encryption key.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.high_space_usage_protection
documentation:
:Property:

highSpaceUsageProtection: Specifies whether to forcibly delete log backup files when the space usage of the
instance exceeds 80% or the remaining space is less than 5 GB. Valid values:
Enable and Disable. You can retain the default value. Note You must specify
this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.instance_network_type
documentation: :Property: instanceNetworkType: Instance network type, VPC or Classic

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.io_acceleration_enabled
documentation: :Property: ioAccelerationEnabled: Whether to enable IO Acceleration, 1 for enable 0 for disable.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.local_log_retention_hours
documentation:
:Property:

localLogRetentionHours: The number of hours for which to retain log backup files on the instance.
Valid values: 0 to 168. The value 0 specifies not to retain log backup files on the instance.
You can retain the default value. Note You must specify this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode
parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.local_log_retention_space
documentation:
:Property:

localLogRetentionSpace: The maximum percentage of space that is allowed to store log backup files on the instance.
If the space usage for log backup files exceeds this percentage, the system deletes earlier
log backup files until the space usage falls below this percentage. Valid values:0 to 50.
You can retain the default value. Note You must specify this parameter when the
BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.log_backup_frequency
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupFrequency: The frequency at which to back up logs. Valid values:
The value LogInterval specifies to back up logs every 30 minutes.
The default value of this parameter is the same as the data backup frequency.
Note The value LogInterval is supported only when the instance runs SQL Server.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.log_backup_local_retention_number
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupLocalRetentionNumber: The number of log backup files that can be retained on the instance.
Default value: 60. Valid values: 6 to 100.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.log_backup_retention_period
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupRetentionPeriod: The number of days for which to retain log backup files. Valid values: 7 to 730. The log backup
retention period cannot be longer than the data backup retention period.Note If you enable the log
backup function, you can specify the log backup retention period. This applies only when the
instance runs MySQL, PostgreSQL, or PPAS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.maintain_time
documentation: :Property: maintainTime: The period during which the maintenance performs. The format is HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.master_username
documentation: :Property: masterUsername: The master user name for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.master_user_password
documentation: :Property: masterUserPassword: The master password for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.master_user_type
documentation:
:Property:

masterUserType: Privilege type of account.
Normal: Common privilege.
Super: High privilege.
Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server)
The default value is Normal.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.multi_az
documentation: :Property: multiAz: Specifies if the database instance is a multiple Availability Zone deployment.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.pay_type
documentation: :Property: payType: The charge type of created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.period
documentation:
:Property:

period: The subscription duration. Valid values:
When PeriodType is Month, it could be from 1 to 12, 24, 36, 48, 60.
When PeriodType is Year, it could be from 1 to 5.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.period_type
documentation: :Property: periodType: Charge period for created instances.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.port
documentation: :Property: port: The port of the database service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.preferred_backup_period
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupPeriod: The backup period. Separate multiple values with commas (,). The default value is the original value. Valid values:Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.preferred_backup_time
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupTime: The time when the backup task is performed. Format: yyyy-MM-ddZ-HH:mm:ssZ.Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.private_ip_address
documentation: :Property: privateIpAddress: The private ip for created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.released_keep_policy
documentation:
:Property:

releasedKeepPolicy: The policy used to retain archived backups if the instance is released. Default value: None.
Valid values:
Lastest: Only the last archived backup is retained.
All: All of the archived backups are retained.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.role_arn
documentation: :Property: roleArn: The Alibaba Cloud Resource Name (ARN) provided to the service account of the instance by your Alibaba Cloud account to connect to KMS. You can copy the ARN from the RAM console.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.security_group_id
documentation:
:Property:

securityGroupId: The ID of the ECS security groups.
Each RDS instance can be associated with up to three ECS security groups.
You must separate them with commas (,).
To delete an ECS Security group, leave this parameter empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.serverless_config
documentation: :Property: serverlessConfig: The config of RDS serverless instance. This is required when creating serverless instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.slave_zone_ids
documentation: :Property: slaveZoneIds: List of slave zone ids can specify slave zone ids when creating the high-availability or enterprise edition instance. Meanwhile, VSwitchId needs to pass in the corresponding vswitch id to the slave zone by order. For example, ZoneId = "zone-a" and SlaveZoneIds = ["zone-c", "zone-b"], then the VSwitchId must be "vsw-zone-a,vsw-zone-c,vsw-zone-b".

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.sql_collector_status
documentation:
:Property:

sqlCollectorStatus: Specifies whether to enable or disable the SQL Explorer (SQL audit) feature.
Valid values:Enable | Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.ssl_setting
documentation:
:Property:

sslSetting: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) link setting of the instance. Valid values:
Disabled: Disable SSL
EnabledForPublicConnection: Public connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate. It requires AllocatePublicConnection is true.
EnabledForInnerConnection: Private connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate.
Default value is Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.storage_auto_scale
documentation: :Property: storageAutoScale: Storage space automatic expansion switch, only supported by MySQL and PostgreSQL

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.storage_threshold
documentation: :Property: storageThreshold: Storage space automatic expansion trigger threshold (percentage)

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.storage_upper_bound
documentation: :Property: storageUpperBound: The total storage space upper limit for automatic storage space expansion, that is, automatic expansion will not cause the total storage space of the instance to exceed this value.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.tags
documentation:
:Property:

tags: The tags of an instance.
You should input the information of the tag with the format of the Key-Value, such as {"key1":"value1","key2":"value2", ... "key5":"value5"}.
At most 20 tags can be specified.
Key
It can be up to 64 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Cannot be a null string.
Value
It can be up to 128 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Can be a null string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.target_dedicated_host_id_for_log
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForLog: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a log instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.target_dedicated_host_id_for_master
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForMaster: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a primary instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.target_dedicated_host_id_for_slave
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForSlave: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a secondary instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The vSwitch id of created instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: selected zone to create database instance. You cannot set the ZoneId parameter if the MultiAZ parameter is set to true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.max_capacity
documentation: :Property: maxCapacity: The maximum value of the automatic scaling range of an instance RCU (RDS Capacity Unit). Value: 0.5-8.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.min_capacity
documentation: :Property: minCapacity: The minimum value of the automatic scaling range of an instance RCU (RDS Capacity Unit). Value: 0.5-8.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.auto_pause
documentation:
:Property:

autoPause: Whether to enable intelligent pause and start of serverless instances. Value:
true: enabled.
false: not enabled (default).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.switch_force
documentation:
:Property:

switchForce: Whether to enable mandatory elastic scaling of serverless instances. Value:
true: enabled.
false: not enabled (default).

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::DBInstance`, which is used to create an ApsaraDB RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DBInstance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-dbinstance>

documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.attr_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceId: The instance id of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.attr_inner_connection_string
documentation: :Attribute: InnerConnectionString: DB instance connection url by Intranet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.attr_inner_ip_address
documentation: :Attribute: InnerIPAddress: IP Address for created DB instance of Intranet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.attr_inner_port
documentation: :Attribute: InnerPort: Intranet port of created DB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.attr_public_connection_string
documentation: :Attribute: PublicConnectionString: DB instance connection url by Internet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.attr_public_ip_address

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: Instance id

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.pay_type
documentation: :Property: payType: The charge type of created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.allocate_public_connection
documentation: :Property: allocatePublicConnection: If true, allocate public connection automate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.backup_id
documentation:
:Property:

backupId: The ID of the backup set that you want to use.
You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the most recent backup set list.
Note You must specify at least one of the BackupId and RestoreTime parameters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.backup_retention_period
documentation: :Property: backupRetentionPeriod: The retention period of the data backup. Value range: 7 to 730. The default value is the original value. Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.backup_type
documentation:
:Property:

backupType: The type of backup used by the new instance. Valid values:

- FullBackup: full backup
- IncrementalBackup: incremental backup

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.category
documentation:
:Property:

category: The edition of the instance. Valid values:
Basic: RDS Basic Edition
HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition
cluster: RDS Cluster Edition
AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition for SQL Server
Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition
serverless_basic: RDS Serverless Basic Edition

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.connection_string_prefix
documentation:
:Property:

connectionStringPrefix: The prefix of the endpoint.
Only the prefix of the CurrentConnectionString parameter value can be modified.
The prefix must be 8 to 64 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.connection_string_type
documentation: :Property: connectionStringType: The endpoint type of the instance, allow values: Inner, Public

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.db_instance_class
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceClass: Database instance type. Refer the RDS database instance type reference, such as 'rds.mys2.large', 'rds.mss1.large', 'rds.pg.s1.small' etc

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.db_instance_description
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceDescription: Description of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.db_instance_storage
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorage: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: GB. The storage capacity increases in increments of 5 GB.
You can call the DescribeAvailableResource operation to query the storage capacity range that is supported for a specified instance type in a region.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.db_instance_storage_type
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorageType: The storage type of the instance. Valid values:
local_ssd: specifies to use local SSDs. This is the recommended storage type.
cloud_ssd: specifies to use standard SSDs.
cloud_essd: enhanced SSD of performance level (PL)1.
cloud_essd2: enhanced SSD of PL2.
cloud_essd3: enhanced SSD of PL3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.db_mappings
documentation: :Property: dbMappings: Database mappings to attach to db instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.db_names
documentation: :Property: dbNames: The names of the databases that you want to create on the new instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.dedicated_host_group_id
documentation: :Property: dedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the host group to which the instance belongs if you create an instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.instance_network_type
documentation:
:Property:

instanceNetworkType: The network type of the new instance. Valid values:

- VPC
- Classic
The default value is the network type of the original instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.maintain_time
documentation: :Property: maintainTime: The period during which the maintenance performs. The format is HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.master_username
documentation: :Property: masterUsername: The master user name for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.master_user_password
documentation: :Property: masterUserPassword: The master password for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.master_user_type
documentation:
:Property:

masterUserType: Privilege type of account.
Normal: Common privilege.
Super: High privilege.
Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server)
The default value is Normal.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.period
documentation:
:Property:

period: The subscription duration. Valid values:
When PeriodType is Month, it could be from 1 to 12, 24, 36, 48, 60.
When PeriodType is Year, it could be from 1 to 5.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.period_type
documentation: :Property: periodType: Charge period for created instances.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.port
documentation: :Property: port: The port of the database service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.preferred_backup_period
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupPeriod: The backup period. Separate multiple values with commas (,). The default value is the original value. Valid values:Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.preferred_backup_time
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupTime: The time when the backup task is performed. Format: yyyy-MM-ddZ-HH:mm:ssZ.Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.private_ip_address
documentation: :Property: privateIpAddress: The private ip for created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.restore_table
documentation:
:Property:

restoreTable: Specifies whether to restore specific databases and tables.
The value 1 specifies to restore specific databases and tables.
If you do not want to restore specific databases or tables, you can choose not to specify this parameter.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.restore_time
documentation:
:Property:

restoreTime: The point in time to which you want to restore the data of the original instance.
The point in time must fall within the specified log backup retention period.
The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format.
The time must be in UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.security_group_id
documentation:
:Property:

securityGroupId: The ID of the ECS security groups.
Each RDS instance can be associated with up to three ECS security groups.
You must separate them with commas (,).
To delete an ECS Security group, leave this parameter empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.security_ip_list
documentation: :Property: securityIpList: Security ip to access the database instance, combine with comma, 0.0.0.0/0 means no limitation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.slave_zone_ids
documentation: :Property: slaveZoneIds: List of slave zone ids can specify slave zone ids when creating the high-availability or enterprise edition instance. Meanwhile, VSwitchId needs to pass in the corresponding vswitch id to the slave zone by order. For example, ZoneId = "zone-a" and SlaveZoneIds = ["zone-c", "zone-b"], then the VSwitchId must be "vsw-zone-a,vsw-zone-c,vsw-zone-b".

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.sql_collector_status
documentation:
:Property:

sqlCollectorStatus: Specifies whether to enable or disable the SQL Explorer (SQL audit) feature.
Valid values:Enable | Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.ssl_setting
documentation:
:Property:

sslSetting: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) link setting of the instance. Valid values:
Disabled: Disable SSL
EnabledForPublicConnection: Public connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate. It requires AllocatePublicConnection is true.
EnabledForInnerConnection: Private connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate.
Default value is Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.table_meta
documentation: :Property: tableMeta: The information about the databases and tables that you want to restore.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.tags
documentation:
:Property:

tags: The tags of an instance.
You should input the information of the tag with the format of the Key-Value, such as {"key1":"value1","key2":"value2", ... "key5":"value5"}.
At most 20 tags can be specified.
Key
It can be up to 64 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Cannot be a null string.
Value
It can be up to 128 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Can be a null string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.timeout_in_minutes
documentation: :Property: timeoutInMinutes: The timeout period for creating the clone instance resource. Unit: Minute. Default: 120.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The VPC id of created database instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The vSwitch id of created instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceClone.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: selected zone to create database instance. You cannot set the ZoneId parameter if the MultiAZ parameter is set to true.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::DBInstanceClone`, which is used to restore historical data of an instance to a new instance.

The new instance is the clone of the instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DBInstanceClone` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-dbinstanceclone>

You should input the information of the tag with the format of the Key-Value, such as {"key1":"value1","key2":"value2", ... "key5":"value5"}.
At most 20 tags can be specified.
Key
It can be up to 64 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Cannot be a null string.
Value
It can be up to 128 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Can be a null string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceCloneProps.timeout_in_minutes
documentation: :Property: timeoutInMinutes: The timeout period for creating the clone instance resource. Unit: Minute. Default: 120.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceCloneProps.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The VPC id of created database instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceCloneProps.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The vSwitch id of created instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceCloneProps.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: selected zone to create database instance. You cannot set the ZoneId parameter if the MultiAZ parameter is set to true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_instance_class
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceClass: Database instance type. Refer the RDS database instance type reference, such as 'rds.mys2.large', 'rds.mss1.large', 'rds.pg.s1.small' etc

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_instance_storage
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorage: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: GB. The storage capacity increases in increments of 5 GB.
You can call the DescribeAvailableResource operation to query the storage capacity range that is supported for a specified instance type in a region.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.engine
documentation: :Property: engine: Database instance engine type. Support MySQL/SQLServer/PostgreSQL/PPAS/MariaDB now.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.engine_version
documentation:
:Property:

engineVersion: Database instance version of the relative engine type. Support:
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to MySQL: 5.5, 5.6, 5.7, and 8.0
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to SQL Server: 2008r2, 08r2_ent_ha, 2012, 2012_ent_ha, 2012_std_ha, 2012_web, 2014_std_ha, 2016_ent_ha, 2016_std_ha, 2016_web, 2017_std_ha, 2017_ent, 2019_std_ha, and 2019_ent
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to PostgreSQL: 10.0, 11.0, 12.0, 13.0, and 14.0
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to MariaDB: 10.3

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.security_ip_list
documentation: :Property: securityIpList: Security ip to access the database instance, combine with comma, 0.0.0.0/0 means no limitation.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.allocate_public_connection
documentation: :Property: allocatePublicConnection: If true, allocate public connection automate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.archive_backup_keep_count
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupKeepCount: The number of archived backups that can be retained. Default value: 1. Valid values:
The value of this parameter ranges from 1 to 31 when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to ByMonth.
The value of this parameter ranges from 1 to 7 when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to ByWeek.
Note You do not need to specify this parameter when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to KeepAll.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.archive_backup_keep_policy
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupKeepPolicy: The period for which to retain archived backups. The number of archived backups that can
be retained within the specified period is determined by the ArchiveBackupKeepCount parameter.
Default value: 0. Valid values:
ByMonth
ByWeek
KeepAll

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.archive_backup_retention_period
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupRetentionPeriod: The number of days for which to retain archived backups.
The default value 0 specifies not to enable the backup archiving function. Valid values: 30 to 1095.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.auto_renew
documentation:
:Property:

autoRenew: Specifies whether to enable auto-renewal. Valid values: true and false. Note
:Monthly subscription: The auto-renewal cycle is one month.
Annual subscription: The auto-renewal cycle is one year.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.back_up_category
documentation:
:Property:

backUpCategory: Specifies whether to enable the second-level backup function. This function allows a backup
to be completed within seconds. Valid values:
Flash: specifies to enable the second-level backup function.
Standard: specifies to disable the second-level backup function.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.backup_policy_mode
documentation:
:Property:

backupPolicyMode: Backup type,
DataBackupPolicy: data backup
LogBackupPolicy: log backup

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.backup_retention_period
documentation: :Property: backupRetentionPeriod: The retention period of the data backup. Value range: 7 to 730. The default value is the original value. Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.bursting_enabled
documentation: :Property: burstingEnabled: Whether to enable bursting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.category
documentation:
:Property:

category: The edition of the instance. Valid values:
Basic: RDS Basic Edition
HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition
cluster: RDS Cluster Edition
AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition for SQL Server
Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition
serverless_basic: RDS Serverless Basic Edition

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.cold_data_enabled
documentation: :Property: coldDataEnabled: Whether to enable cold data storage.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.compress_type
documentation:
:Property:

compressType: The format used to compress backups. Valid values:
1: The zlib tool is used to compress backups into .tar.gz files.
4: The QuickLZ tool is used to compress backups into .xb.gz files.
This compression format is supported only when the instance runs MySQL 5.6 or 5.7.
It can be used to restore individual databases and tables.
8: The QuickLZ tool is used to compress backups into .xb.gz files.
This compression format is supported only when the instance runs MySQL 8.0.
It cannot be used to restore individual databases or tables.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.connection_mode
documentation: :Property: connectionMode: Connection Mode for database instance,support 'Standard' and 'Safe' mode. Default is RDS system assigns.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.connection_string_prefix
documentation:
:Property:

connectionStringPrefix: The prefix of the endpoint.
Only the prefix of the CurrentConnectionString parameter value can be modified.
The prefix must be 8 to 64 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.connection_string_type
documentation: :Property: connectionStringType: The endpoint type of the instance, allow values: Inner, Public

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_instance_description
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceDescription: Description of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_instance_net_type
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceNetType: Database instance net type, default is Intranet.Internet for public access, Intranet for private access.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_instance_storage_type
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorageType: The storage type of the instance. Valid values:
local_ssd: specifies to use local SSDs. This is the recommended storage type.
cloud_ssd: specifies to use standard SSDs.
cloud_essd: enhanced SSD of performance level (PL)1.
cloud_essd2: enhanced SSD of PL2.
cloud_essd3: enhanced SSD of PL3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_is_ignore_case
documentation:
:Property:

dbIsIgnoreCase: Specifies whether table names are case-sensitive. Valid values:
1: Table names are not case-sensitive. This is the default value.
0: Table names are case-sensitive.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_mappings
documentation: :Property: dbMappings: Database mappings to attach to db instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_param_group_id
documentation: :Property: dbParamGroupId: The ID of the parameter template used by the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.db_time_zone
documentation: :Property: dbTimeZone: The UTC time zone of the instance. Valid values: -12:00 to +12:00. The time zone must be an integer value such as +08:00. Values such as +08:30 are not allowed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.dedicated_host_group_id
documentation: :Property: dedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the host group to which the instance belongs if you create an instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.deletion_protection
documentation: :Property: deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable the release protection feature for the instance. This feature is available only for pay-as-you-go instances. Default is false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.enable_backup_log
documentation:
:Property:

enableBackupLog: Specifies whether to enable the log backup function. Valid values:
True: specifies to enable the log backup function.
False: specifies to disable the log backup function.
Note You must specify this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.encryption_key
documentation: :Property: encryptionKey: The ID of the encryption key that is used to encrypt data on SSDs in the region. You can view the encryption key ID in the Key Management Service (KMS) console. You can also create an encryption key.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.high_space_usage_protection
documentation:
:Property:

highSpaceUsageProtection: Specifies whether to forcibly delete log backup files when the space usage of the
instance exceeds 80% or the remaining space is less than 5 GB. Valid values:
Enable and Disable. You can retain the default value. Note You must specify
this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.instance_network_type
documentation: :Property: instanceNetworkType: Instance network type, VPC or Classic

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.io_acceleration_enabled
documentation: :Property: ioAccelerationEnabled: Whether to enable IO Acceleration, 1 for enable 0 for disable.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.local_log_retention_hours
documentation:
:Property:

localLogRetentionHours: The number of hours for which to retain log backup files on the instance.
Valid values: 0 to 168. The value 0 specifies not to retain log backup files on the instance.
You can retain the default value. Note You must specify this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode
parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.local_log_retention_space
documentation:
:Property:

localLogRetentionSpace: The maximum percentage of space that is allowed to store log backup files on the instance.
If the space usage for log backup files exceeds this percentage, the system deletes earlier
log backup files until the space usage falls below this percentage. Valid values:0 to 50.
You can retain the default value. Note You must specify this parameter when the
BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.log_backup_frequency
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupFrequency: The frequency at which to back up logs. Valid values:
The value LogInterval specifies to back up logs every 30 minutes.
The default value of this parameter is the same as the data backup frequency.
Note The value LogInterval is supported only when the instance runs SQL Server.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.log_backup_local_retention_number
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupLocalRetentionNumber: The number of log backup files that can be retained on the instance.
Default value: 60. Valid values: 6 to 100.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.log_backup_retention_period
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupRetentionPeriod: The number of days for which to retain log backup files. Valid values: 7 to 730. The log backup
retention period cannot be longer than the data backup retention period.Note If you enable the log
backup function, you can specify the log backup retention period. This applies only when the
instance runs MySQL, PostgreSQL, or PPAS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.maintain_time
documentation: :Property: maintainTime: The period during which the maintenance performs. The format is HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.master_username
documentation: :Property: masterUsername: The master user name for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.master_user_password
documentation: :Property: masterUserPassword: The master password for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.master_user_type
documentation:
:Property:

masterUserType: Privilege type of account.
Normal: Common privilege.
Super: High privilege.
Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server)
The default value is Normal.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.multi_az
documentation: :Property: multiAz: Specifies if the database instance is a multiple Availability Zone deployment.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.pay_type
documentation: :Property: payType: The charge type of created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.period
documentation:
:Property:

period: The subscription duration. Valid values:
When PeriodType is Month, it could be from 1 to 12, 24, 36, 48, 60.
When PeriodType is Year, it could be from 1 to 5.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.period_type
documentation: :Property: periodType: Charge period for created instances.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.port
documentation: :Property: port: The port of the database service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.preferred_backup_period
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupPeriod: The backup period. Separate multiple values with commas (,). The default value is the original value. Valid values:Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.preferred_backup_time
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupTime: The time when the backup task is performed. Format: yyyy-MM-ddZ-HH:mm:ssZ.Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.private_ip_address
documentation: :Property: privateIpAddress: The private ip for created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.released_keep_policy
documentation:
:Property:

releasedKeepPolicy: The policy used to retain archived backups if the instance is released. Default value: None.
Valid values:
Lastest: Only the last archived backup is retained.
All: All of the archived backups are retained.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.role_arn
documentation: :Property: roleArn: The Alibaba Cloud Resource Name (ARN) provided to the service account of the instance by your Alibaba Cloud account to connect to KMS. You can copy the ARN from the RAM console.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.security_group_id
documentation:
:Property:

securityGroupId: The ID of the ECS security groups.
Each RDS instance can be associated with up to three ECS security groups.
You must separate them with commas (,).
To delete an ECS Security group, leave this parameter empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.serverless_config
documentation: :Property: serverlessConfig: The config of RDS serverless instance. This is required when creating serverless instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.slave_zone_ids
documentation: :Property: slaveZoneIds: List of slave zone ids can specify slave zone ids when creating the high-availability or enterprise edition instance. Meanwhile, VSwitchId needs to pass in the corresponding vswitch id to the slave zone by order. For example, ZoneId = "zone-a" and SlaveZoneIds = ["zone-c", "zone-b"], then the VSwitchId must be "vsw-zone-a,vsw-zone-c,vsw-zone-b".

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.sql_collector_status
documentation:
:Property:

sqlCollectorStatus: Specifies whether to enable or disable the SQL Explorer (SQL audit) feature.
Valid values:Enable | Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.ssl_setting
documentation:
:Property:

sslSetting: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) link setting of the instance. Valid values:
Disabled: Disable SSL
EnabledForPublicConnection: Public connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate. It requires AllocatePublicConnection is true.
EnabledForInnerConnection: Private connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate.
Default value is Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.storage_auto_scale
documentation: :Property: storageAutoScale: Storage space automatic expansion switch, only supported by MySQL and PostgreSQL

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.storage_threshold
documentation: :Property: storageThreshold: Storage space automatic expansion trigger threshold (percentage)

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.storage_upper_bound
documentation: :Property: storageUpperBound: The total storage space upper limit for automatic storage space expansion, that is, automatic expansion will not cause the total storage space of the instance to exceed this value.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.tags
documentation:
:Property:

tags: The tags of an instance.
You should input the information of the tag with the format of the Key-Value, such as {"key1":"value1","key2":"value2", ... "key5":"value5"}.
At most 20 tags can be specified.
Key
It can be up to 64 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Cannot be a null string.
Value
It can be up to 128 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Can be a null string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.target_dedicated_host_id_for_log
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForLog: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a log instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.target_dedicated_host_id_for_master
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForMaster: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a primary instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.target_dedicated_host_id_for_slave
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForSlave: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a secondary instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The VPC id of created database instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The vSwitch id of created instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceProps.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: selected zone to create database instance. You cannot set the ZoneId parameter if the MultiAZ parameter is set to true.

classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIps

documentation:

param props: '- resource properties.'

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIps.attr_security_ips
documentation: :Attribute: SecurityIps: The security ips of selected database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIps.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: Database instance id to update security ips.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIps.db_instance_ip_array_attribute
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceIpArrayAttribute: Security ips to add or remove.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIps.db_instance_ip_array_name
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceIpArrayName: Group name of the security ips, only support lower characters and '_'. Advice use a new group name avoid effect your database system. If the properties is not specified, it will set to default group, please be careful.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::DBInstanceSecurityIps`, which is used to modify an IP address whitelist of an ApsaraDB for RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DBInstanceSecurityIps` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-dbinstancesecurityips>

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIpsProps.__init__
documentation:

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIpsProps.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: Database instance id to update security ips.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIpsProps.db_instance_ip_array_attribute
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceIpArrayAttribute: Security ips to add or remove.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDBInstanceSecurityIpsProps.db_instance_ip_array_name
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceIpArrayName: Group name of the security ips, only support lower characters and '_'. Advice use a new group name avoid effect your database system. If the properties is not specified, it will set to default group, please be careful.

classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDatabase

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDatabase.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDatabase.character_set_name
documentation:
:Property:

characterSetName: The character set you want to use for the database. Valid values:
MySQL and MariaDB: utf8 | gbk | latin1 | utf8mb4.
SQL Server: Chinese_PRC_CI_AS | Chinese_PRC_CS_AS | SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS | SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS
| Chinese_PRC_BIN.
PostgreSQL: KOI8U | UTF8 | WIN866 | WIN874 | WIN1250 | WIN1251 | WIN1252 | WIN1253 | WIN1254 |
WIN1255 | WIN1256 | WIN1257 | WIN1258 | EUC_CN | EUC_KR | EUC_TW | EUC_JP | EUC_JIS_2004
| KOI8R | MULE_INTERNAL | LATIN1 | LATIN2 | LATIN3 | LATIN4 | LATIN5 | LATIN6 | LATIN7
| LATIN8 | LATIN9 | LATIN10 | ISO_8859_5 | ISO_8859_6 | ISO_8859_7 | ISO_8859_8 |
SQL_ASCII.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDatabase.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: The ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDatabase.db_name
documentation:
:Property:

dbName: The name of the database you want to create.
Note
The name must be 2 to 64 characters in length.
The name must start with a lowercase letter and end with a lowercase letter or digit.
The name can contain lowercase letters, digits, underscores (_), and hyphens (-).
The name must be unique in the instance.
For more information about invalid characters, see Forbidden keywords table.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosDatabase.db_description
documentation:
:Property:

dbDescription: The description of the database. The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length.
The description must start with a letter and can contain letters, digits, underscores
(_), and hyphens (-).
Note The description cannot start with http:// or https://.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::Database`, which is used to create a database in an ApsaraDB for RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Database` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-database>

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.attr_db_name
documentation: :Attribute: DBName: The name of the database that you want to restore.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.attr_migrate_task_id
documentation: :Attribute: MigrateTaskId: The ID of the migrate task.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.backup_mode
documentation:
:Property:

backupMode: The type of the migration task. Valid values:
FULL: specifies that full backup files are used to restore data.
UPDF: specifies that incremental backup files or log files are used to restore incremental data.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: The ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.db_name
documentation: :Property: dbName: The name of the database that you want to restore.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.is_online_db
documentation: :Property: isOnlineDb: Specifies whether to bring the restored database online for user access. Note The value for SQL Server 2008 R2 is fixed to True.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.check_db_mode
documentation:
:Property:

checkDbMode: The consistency check method of the database. Valid values:
SyncExecuteDBCheck: synchronous database check
AsyncExecuteDBCheck: asynchronous database check
Default value: AsyncExecuteDBCheck (compatible with SQL Server 2008 R2).
Note When IsOnlineDB is set to True, this value is valid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.oss_object_positions
documentation:
:Property:

ossObjectPositions: The information of the backup file in the OSS bucket.
The values consist of three parts that are separated by colons (:):
The endpoint of the OSS bucket: oss-ap-southeast-1.aliyuncs.com.
The name of the OSS bucket: rdsmssqlsingapore.
The key of the backup file in the OSS bucket: autotest_2008R2_TestMigration_FULL.bak.
Note
This parameter is optional for instances that run SQL Server 2008 R2.
This parameter is required for instances that run a database engine later than SQL
Server 2008 R2.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTask.oss_urls
documentation:
:Property:

ossUrls: The shared URL of the backup file in the OSS bucket. The URL must be encoded.
If you specify multiple URLs, separate them with vertical bars (|) and then encode
them.
Note This parameter must be entered for instances that run SQL Server 2008 R2.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::MigrateTask`, which is used to create a migration task to restore backup files from an Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket to an ApsaraDB RDS for SQL Server instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `MigrateTask` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-migratetask>

```
param backup_mode



param db_instance_id



param db_name



param is_online_db



param check_db_mode



param oss_object_positions



param oss_urls

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTaskProps.backup_mode
documentation:
:Property:

backupMode: The type of the migration task. Valid values:
FULL: specifies that full backup files are used to restore data.
UPDF: specifies that incremental backup files or log files are used to restore incremental data.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTaskProps.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: The ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTaskProps.db_name
documentation: :Property: dbName: The name of the database that you want to restore.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTaskProps.is_online_db
documentation: :Property: isOnlineDb: Specifies whether to bring the restored database online for user access. Note The value for SQL Server 2008 R2 is fixed to True.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTaskProps.check_db_mode
documentation:
:Property:

checkDbMode: The consistency check method of the database. Valid values:
SyncExecuteDBCheck: synchronous database check
AsyncExecuteDBCheck: asynchronous database check
Default value: AsyncExecuteDBCheck (compatible with SQL Server 2008 R2).
Note When IsOnlineDB is set to True, this value is valid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTaskProps.oss_object_positions
documentation:
:Property:

ossObjectPositions: The information of the backup file in the OSS bucket.
The values consist of three parts that are separated by colons (:):
The endpoint of the OSS bucket: oss-ap-southeast-1.aliyuncs.com.
The name of the OSS bucket: rdsmssqlsingapore.
The key of the backup file in the OSS bucket: autotest_2008R2_TestMigration_FULL.bak.
Note
This parameter is optional for instances that run SQL Server 2008 R2.
This parameter is required for instances that run a database engine later than SQL
Server 2008 R2.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosMigrateTaskProps.oss_urls
documentation:
:Property:

ossUrls: The shared URL of the backup file in the OSS bucket. The URL must be encoded.
If you specify multiple URLs, separate them with vertical bars (|) and then encode
them.
Note This parameter must be entered for instances that run SQL Server 2008 R2.

documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPostgresExtensions.attr_installed_extension_names
documentation: :Attribute: InstalledExtensionNames: Extension names installed via ROS

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPostgresExtensions.account_name
documentation: :Property: accountName: The account of the user who owns the extension. Only privileged accounts are supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPostgresExtensions.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: The instance ID. You can call the DescribeDBInstances operation to query the instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPostgresExtensions.db_name
documentation: :Property: dbName: The database name. You can call the DescribeDatabases operation to query the database name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPostgresExtensions.extensions
documentation: :Property: extensions: The extensions that you want to install.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPostgresExtensions.resource_group_id

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPostgresExtensions.risk_confirmed
documentation:
:Property:

riskConfirmed: The risk description that you need to confirm. If your instance runs an outdated minor engine version, installing specific extensions on the instance poses security risks. Proceed with the installation only after you acknowledge these risks. Valid values:
true
false
Note For more information about the risks, see Limits on extension creation for ApsaraDB RDS for PostgreSQL instances.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPostgresExtensions.source_database
documentation: :Property: sourceDatabase: The source database from which you want to synchronize the extension to the destination database. If you do not specify the Extensions parameter, you must specify this parameter.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::PostgresExtensions`, which is used to install extensions on a database.
