classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance._render_properties
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.attr_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceId: The instance id of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.attr_inner_connection_string
documentation: :Attribute: InnerConnectionString: DB instance connection url by Intranet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.attr_inner_ip_address
documentation: :Attribute: InnerIPAddress: IP Address for created DB instance of Intranet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.attr_inner_port
documentation: :Attribute: InnerPort: Intranet port of created DB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.attr_order_id
documentation: :Attribute: OrderId: The order id list of created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.attr_public_connection_string
documentation: :Attribute: PublicConnectionString: DB instance connection url by Internet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.attr_public_ip_address
documentation: :Attribute: PublicIPAddress: IP Address for created DB instance of Internet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.attr_public_port
documentation: :Attribute: PublicPort: Internet port of created DB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.commodity_code
documentation: :Property: commodityCode: The CommodityCode of the order.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_instance_class
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceClass: Database instance type. Refer the RDS database instance type reference, such as 'rds.mys2.large', 'rds.mss1.large', 'rds.pg.s1.small' etc

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_instance_storage
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorage: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: GB. The storage capacity increases in increments of 5 GB.
You can call the DescribeAvailableResource operation to query the storage capacity range that is supported for a specified instance type in a region.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.engine
documentation: :Property: engine: Database instance engine type. Support MySQL/SQLServer/PostgreSQL/PPAS/MariaDB now.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.engine_version
documentation:
:Property:

engineVersion: Database instance version of the relative engine type. Support:
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to MySQL: 5.5, 5.6, 5.7, and 8.0
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to SQL Server: 2008r2, 08r2_ent_ha, 2012, 2012_ent_ha, 2012_std_ha, 2012_web, 2014_std_ha, 2016_ent_ha, 2016_std_ha, 2016_web, 2017_std_ha, 2017_ent, 2019_std_ha, and 2019_ent
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to PostgreSQL: 10.0, 11.0, 12.0, 13.0, and 14.0
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to MariaDB: 10.3

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.period
documentation: :Property: period: Prepaid time period. While choose by pay by month, it could be from 1 to 9. While choose pay by year, it could be from 1 to 3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.period_type
documentation: :Property: periodType: Charge period for created instances.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.allocate_public_connection
documentation: :Property: allocatePublicConnection: If true, allocate public connection automate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.archive_backup_keep_count
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupKeepCount: The number of archived backups that can be retained. Default value: 1. Valid values:
The value of this parameter ranges from 1 to 31 when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to ByMonth.
The value of this parameter ranges from 1 to 7 when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to ByWeek.
Note You do not need to specify this parameter when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to KeepAll.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.archive_backup_keep_policy
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupKeepPolicy: The period for which to retain archived backups. The number of archived backups that can
be retained within the specified period is determined by the ArchiveBackupKeepCount parameter.
Default value: 0. Valid values:
ByMonth
ByWeek
KeepAll

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.archive_backup_retention_period
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupRetentionPeriod: The number of days for which to retain archived backups.
The default value 0 specifies not to enable the backup archiving function. Valid values: 30 to 1095.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.auto_pay
documentation: :Property: autoPay: Automatic Payment. Default is true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.auto_renew
documentation: :Property: autoRenew: Auto renew the prepay instance. If the period type is by year, it will renew by year, else it will renew by month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.back_up_category
documentation:
:Property:

backUpCategory: Specifies whether to enable the second-level backup function. This function allows a backup
to be completed within seconds. Valid values:
Flash: specifies to enable the second-level backup function.
Standard: specifies to disable the second-level backup function.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.backup_policy_mode
documentation:
:Property:

backupPolicyMode: Backup type,
DataBackupPolicy: data backup
LogBackupPolicy: log backup

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.backup_retention_period
documentation: :Property: backupRetentionPeriod: The retention period of the data backup. Value range: 7 to 730. The default value is the original value. Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.bursting_enabled
documentation: :Property: burstingEnabled: Whether to enable bursting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.category
documentation:
:Property:

category: The edition of the instance. Valid values:
Basic: RDS Basic Edition
HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition
cluster: RDS Cluster Edition
AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition for SQL Server
Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition
serverless_basic: RDS Serverless Basic Edition

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.cold_data_enabled
documentation: :Property: coldDataEnabled: Whether to enable cold data storage.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.compress_type
documentation:
:Property:

compressType: The format used to compress backups. Valid values:
1: The zlib tool is used to compress backups into .tar.gz files.
4: The QuickLZ tool is used to compress backups into .xb.gz files.
This compression format is supported only when the instance runs MySQL 5.6 or 5.7.
It can be used to restore individual databases and tables.
8: The QuickLZ tool is used to compress backups into .xb.gz files.
This compression format is supported only when the instance runs MySQL 8.0.
It cannot be used to restore individual databases or tables.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.connection_mode
documentation: :Property: connectionMode: Connection Mode for database instance,support 'Standard' and 'Safe' mode. Default is RDS system assigns.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.connection_string_prefix
documentation:
:Property:

connectionStringPrefix: The prefix of the endpoint.
Only the prefix of the CurrentConnectionString parameter value can be modified.
The prefix must be 8 to 64 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.connection_string_type
documentation: :Property: connectionStringType: The endpoint type of the instance, allow values: Inner, Public

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.coupon_code
documentation: :Property: couponCode: The coupon code of the order.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_instance_description
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceDescription: Description of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_instance_net_type
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceNetType: Database instance net type, default is Intranet.Internet for public access, Intranet for private access.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_instance_storage_type
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorageType: The storage type of the instance. Valid values:
local_ssd: specifies to use local SSDs. This is the recommended storage type.
cloud_ssd: specifies to use standard SSDs.
cloud_essd: enhanced SSD of performance level (PL)1.
cloud_essd2: enhanced SSD of PL2.
cloud_essd3: enhanced SSD of PL3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_is_ignore_case
documentation:
:Property:

dbIsIgnoreCase: Specifies whether table names are case-sensitive. Valid values:
1: Table names are not case-sensitive. This is the default value.
0: Table names are case-sensitive.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_mappings
documentation: :Property: dbMappings: Database mappings to attach to db instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_param_group_id
documentation: :Property: dbParamGroupId: The ID of the parameter template used by the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.db_time_zone
documentation: :Property: dbTimeZone: The UTC time zone of the instance. Valid values: -12:00 to +12:00. The time zone must be an integer value such as +08:00. Values such as +08:30 are not allowed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.dedicated_host_group_id
documentation: :Property: dedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the host group to which the instance belongs if you create an instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.deletion_protection
documentation: :Property: deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable the release protection feature for the instance. This feature is available only for pay-as-you-go instances. Default is false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.enable_backup_log
documentation:
:Property:

enableBackupLog: Specifies whether to enable the log backup function. Valid values:
True: specifies to enable the log backup function.
False: specifies to disable the log backup function.
Note You must specify this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.encryption_key
documentation: :Property: encryptionKey: The ID of the encryption key that is used to encrypt data on SSDs in the region. You can view the encryption key ID in the Key Management Service (KMS) console. You can also create an encryption key.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.high_space_usage_protection
documentation:
:Property:

highSpaceUsageProtection: Specifies whether to forcibly delete log backup files when the space usage of the
instance exceeds 80% or the remaining space is less than 5 GB. Valid values:
Enable and Disable. You can retain the default value. Note You must specify
this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.instance_network_type
documentation: :Property: instanceNetworkType: Instance network type, VPC or Classic

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.io_acceleration_enabled
documentation: :Property: ioAccelerationEnabled: Whether to enable IO Acceleration, 1 for enable 0 for disable.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.local_log_retention_hours
documentation:
:Property:

localLogRetentionHours: The number of hours for which to retain log backup files on the instance.
Valid values: 0 to 168. The value 0 specifies not to retain log backup files on the instance.
You can retain the default value. Note You must specify this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode
parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.local_log_retention_space
documentation:
:Property:

localLogRetentionSpace: The maximum percentage of space that is allowed to store log backup files on the instance.
If the space usage for log backup files exceeds this percentage, the system deletes earlier
log backup files until the space usage falls below this percentage. Valid values:0 to 50.
You can retain the default value. Note You must specify this parameter when the
BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.log_backup_frequency
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupFrequency: The frequency at which to back up logs. Valid values:
The value LogInterval specifies to back up logs every 30 minutes.
The default value of this parameter is the same as the data backup frequency.
Note The value LogInterval is supported only when the instance runs SQL Server.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.log_backup_local_retention_number
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupLocalRetentionNumber: The number of log backup files that can be retained on the instance.
Default value: 60. Valid values: 6 to 100.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.log_backup_retention_period
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupRetentionPeriod: The number of days for which to retain log backup files. Valid values: 7 to 730. The log backup
retention period cannot be longer than the data backup retention period.Note If you enable the log
backup function, you can specify the log backup retention period. This applies only when the
instance runs MySQL, PostgreSQL, or PPAS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.maintain_time
documentation: :Property: maintainTime: The period during which the maintenance performs. The format is HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.master_username
documentation: :Property: masterUsername: The master user name for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.master_user_password
documentation: :Property: masterUserPassword: The master password for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.master_user_type
documentation:
:Property:

masterUserType: Privilege type of account.
Normal: Common privilege.
Super: High privilege.
Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server)
The default value is Normal.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.multi_az
documentation: :Property: multiAz: Specifies if the database instance is a multiple Availability Zone deployment.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.port
documentation: :Property: port: The port of the database service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.preferred_backup_period
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupPeriod: The backup period. Separate multiple values with commas (,). The default value is the original value. Valid values:Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.preferred_backup_time
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupTime: The time when the backup task is performed. Format: yyyy-MM-ddZ-HH:mm:ssZ.Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.private_ip_address
documentation: :Property: privateIpAddress: The private ip for created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.quantity
documentation: :Property: quantity: The number of instance to be created, default is 1, max number is 99

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.released_keep_policy
documentation:
:Property:

releasedKeepPolicy: The policy used to retain archived backups if the instance is released. Default value: None.
Valid values:
Lastest: Only the last archived backup is retained.
All: All of the archived backups are retained.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.role_arn
documentation: :Property: roleArn: The Alibaba Cloud Resource Name (ARN) provided to the service account of the instance by your Alibaba Cloud account to connect to KMS. You can copy the ARN from the RAM console.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.security_group_id
documentation:
:Property:

securityGroupId: The ID of the ECS security groups.
Each RDS instance can be associated with up to three ECS security groups.
You must separate them with commas (,).
To delete an ECS Security group, leave this parameter empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.serverless_config
documentation: :Property: serverlessConfig: The config of RDS serverless instance. This is required when creating serverless instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.slave_zone_ids
documentation: :Property: slaveZoneIds: List of slave zone ids can specify slave zone ids when creating the high-availability or enterprise edition instance. Meanwhile, VSwitchId needs to pass in the corresponding vswitch id to the slave zone by order. For example, ZoneId = "zone-a" and SlaveZoneIds = ["zone-c", "zone-b"], then the VSwitchId must be "vsw-zone-a,vsw-zone-c,vsw-zone-b".

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.sql_collector_status
documentation:
:Property:

sqlCollectorStatus: Specifies whether to enable or disable the SQL Explorer (SQL audit) feature.
Valid values:Enable | Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.ssl_setting
documentation:
:Property:

sslSetting: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) link setting of the instance. Valid values:
Disabled: Disable SSL
EnabledForPublicConnection: Public connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate. It requires AllocatePublicConnection is true.
EnabledForInnerConnection: Private connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate.
Default value is Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.storage_auto_scale
documentation: :Property: storageAutoScale: Storage space automatic expansion switch, only supported by MySQL and PostgreSQL

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.storage_threshold
documentation: :Property: storageThreshold: Storage space automatic expansion trigger threshold (percentage)

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.storage_upper_bound
documentation: :Property: storageUpperBound: The total storage space upper limit for automatic storage space expansion, that is, automatic expansion will not cause the total storage space of the instance to exceed this value.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.tags
documentation:
:Property:

tags: The tags of an instance.
You should input the information of the tag with the format of the Key-Value, such as {"key1":"value1","key2":"value2", ... "key5":"value5"}.
At most 20 tags can be specified.
Key
It can be up to 64 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Cannot be a null string.
Value
It can be up to 128 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Can be a null string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.target_dedicated_host_id_for_log
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForLog: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a log instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.target_dedicated_host_id_for_master
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForMaster: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a primary instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.target_dedicated_host_id_for_slave
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForSlave: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a secondary instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The VPC id of created database instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The vSwitch id of created instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: selected zone to create database instance. You cannot set the ZoneId parameter if the MultiAZ parameter is set to true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.DBMappingsProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param character_set_name: true
param db_description: true
param db_name: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.DBMappingsProperty.character_set_name
documentation: :Property: characterSetName: For supported engines, specifies the character set to associate with the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.DBMappingsProperty.db_name
documentation: :Property: dbName: Consists of [2, 64] lower case letters, numbers, underscores, lines, letters. Must start with a letter, end with letters or numbers

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.DBMappingsProperty.db_description
documentation: :Property: dbDescription: Specifies the database description, containing up to 256 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param auto_pause: true
param max_capacity: true
param min_capacity: true
param switch_force: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.max_capacity
documentation: :Property: maxCapacity: The maximum value of the automatic scaling range of an instance RCU (RDS Capacity Unit). Value: 0.5-8.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.min_capacity
documentation: :Property: minCapacity: The minimum value of the automatic scaling range of an instance RCU (RDS Capacity Unit). Value: 0.5-8.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.auto_pause
documentation:
:Property:

autoPause: Whether to enable intelligent pause and start of serverless instances. Value:
true: enabled.
false: not enabled (default).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstance.ServerlessConfigProperty.switch_force
documentation:
:Property:

switchForce: Whether to enable mandatory elastic scaling of serverless instances. Value:
true: enabled.
false: not enabled (default).

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::PrepayDBInstance`, which is used to create subscription ApsaraDB RDS instances.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `PrepayDBInstance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-prepaydbinstance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.commodity_code
documentation: :Property: commodityCode: The CommodityCode of the order.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_instance_class
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceClass: Database instance type. Refer the RDS database instance type reference, such as 'rds.mys2.large', 'rds.mss1.large', 'rds.pg.s1.small' etc

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_instance_storage
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorage: The storage capacity of the instance. Unit: GB. The storage capacity increases in increments of 5 GB.
You can call the DescribeAvailableResource operation to query the storage capacity range that is supported for a specified instance type in a region.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.engine
documentation: :Property: engine: Database instance engine type. Support MySQL/SQLServer/PostgreSQL/PPAS/MariaDB now.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.engine_version
documentation:
:Property:

engineVersion: Database instance version of the relative engine type. Support:
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to MySQL: 5.5, 5.6, 5.7, and 8.0
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to SQL Server: 2008r2, 08r2_ent_ha, 2012, 2012_ent_ha, 2012_std_ha, 2012_web, 2014_std_ha, 2016_ent_ha, 2016_std_ha, 2016_web, 2017_std_ha, 2017_ent, 2019_std_ha, and 2019_ent
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to PostgreSQL: 10.0, 11.0, 12.0, 13.0, and 14.0
Valid values when you set the Engine parameter to MariaDB: 10.3

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.period
documentation: :Property: period: Prepaid time period. While choose by pay by month, it could be from 1 to 9. While choose pay by year, it could be from 1 to 3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.period_type
documentation: :Property: periodType: Charge period for created instances.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.allocate_public_connection
documentation: :Property: allocatePublicConnection: If true, allocate public connection automate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.archive_backup_keep_count
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupKeepCount: The number of archived backups that can be retained. Default value: 1. Valid values:
The value of this parameter ranges from 1 to 31 when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to ByMonth.
The value of this parameter ranges from 1 to 7 when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to ByWeek.
Note You do not need to specify this parameter when the ArchiveBackupKeepPolicy
parameter is set to KeepAll.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.archive_backup_keep_policy
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupKeepPolicy: The period for which to retain archived backups. The number of archived backups that can
be retained within the specified period is determined by the ArchiveBackupKeepCount parameter.
Default value: 0. Valid values:
ByMonth
ByWeek
KeepAll

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.archive_backup_retention_period
documentation:
:Property:

archiveBackupRetentionPeriod: The number of days for which to retain archived backups.
The default value 0 specifies not to enable the backup archiving function. Valid values: 30 to 1095.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.auto_pay
documentation: :Property: autoPay: Automatic Payment. Default is true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.auto_renew
documentation: :Property: autoRenew: Auto renew the prepay instance. If the period type is by year, it will renew by year, else it will renew by month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.back_up_category
documentation:
:Property:

backUpCategory: Specifies whether to enable the second-level backup function. This function allows a backup
to be completed within seconds. Valid values:
Flash: specifies to enable the second-level backup function.
Standard: specifies to disable the second-level backup function.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.backup_policy_mode
documentation:
:Property:

backupPolicyMode: Backup type,
DataBackupPolicy: data backup
LogBackupPolicy: log backup

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.backup_retention_period
documentation: :Property: backupRetentionPeriod: The retention period of the data backup. Value range: 7 to 730. The default value is the original value. Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.bursting_enabled
documentation: :Property: burstingEnabled: Whether to enable bursting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.category
documentation:
:Property:

category: The edition of the instance. Valid values:
Basic: RDS Basic Edition
HighAvailability: RDS High-availability Edition
cluster: RDS Cluster Edition
AlwaysOn: RDS Cluster Edition for SQL Server
Finance: RDS Enterprise Edition
serverless_basic: RDS Serverless Basic Edition

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.cold_data_enabled
documentation: :Property: coldDataEnabled: Whether to enable cold data storage.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.compress_type
documentation:
:Property:

compressType: The format used to compress backups. Valid values:
1: The zlib tool is used to compress backups into .tar.gz files.
4: The QuickLZ tool is used to compress backups into .xb.gz files.
This compression format is supported only when the instance runs MySQL 5.6 or 5.7.
It can be used to restore individual databases and tables.
8: The QuickLZ tool is used to compress backups into .xb.gz files.
This compression format is supported only when the instance runs MySQL 8.0.
It cannot be used to restore individual databases or tables.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.connection_mode
documentation: :Property: connectionMode: Connection Mode for database instance,support 'Standard' and 'Safe' mode. Default is RDS system assigns.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.connection_string_prefix
documentation:
:Property:

connectionStringPrefix: The prefix of the endpoint.
Only the prefix of the CurrentConnectionString parameter value can be modified.
The prefix must be 8 to 64 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, and hyphens (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.connection_string_type
documentation: :Property: connectionStringType: The endpoint type of the instance, allow values: Inner, Public

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.coupon_code
documentation: :Property: couponCode: The coupon code of the order.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_instance_description
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceDescription: Description of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_instance_net_type
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceNetType: Database instance net type, default is Intranet.Internet for public access, Intranet for private access.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_instance_storage_type
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorageType: The storage type of the instance. Valid values:
local_ssd: specifies to use local SSDs. This is the recommended storage type.
cloud_ssd: specifies to use standard SSDs.
cloud_essd: enhanced SSD of performance level (PL)1.
cloud_essd2: enhanced SSD of PL2.
cloud_essd3: enhanced SSD of PL3.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_is_ignore_case
documentation:
:Property:

dbIsIgnoreCase: Specifies whether table names are case-sensitive. Valid values:
1: Table names are not case-sensitive. This is the default value.
0: Table names are case-sensitive.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_mappings
documentation: :Property: dbMappings: Database mappings to attach to db instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_param_group_id
documentation: :Property: dbParamGroupId: The ID of the parameter template used by the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.db_time_zone
documentation: :Property: dbTimeZone: The UTC time zone of the instance. Valid values: -12:00 to +12:00. The time zone must be an integer value such as +08:00. Values such as +08:30 are not allowed.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.dedicated_host_group_id
documentation: :Property: dedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the host group to which the instance belongs if you create an instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.deletion_protection
documentation: :Property: deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable the release protection feature for the instance. This feature is available only for pay-as-you-go instances. Default is false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.enable_backup_log
documentation:
:Property:

enableBackupLog: Specifies whether to enable the log backup function. Valid values:
True: specifies to enable the log backup function.
False: specifies to disable the log backup function.
Note You must specify this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.encryption_key
documentation: :Property: encryptionKey: The ID of the encryption key that is used to encrypt data on SSDs in the region. You can view the encryption key ID in the Key Management Service (KMS) console. You can also create an encryption key.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.high_space_usage_protection
documentation:
:Property:

highSpaceUsageProtection: Specifies whether to forcibly delete log backup files when the space usage of the
instance exceeds 80% or the remaining space is less than 5 GB. Valid values:
Enable and Disable. You can retain the default value. Note You must specify
this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.instance_network_type
documentation: :Property: instanceNetworkType: Instance network type, VPC or Classic

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.io_acceleration_enabled
documentation: :Property: ioAccelerationEnabled: Whether to enable IO Acceleration, 1 for enable 0 for disable.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.local_log_retention_hours
documentation:
:Property:

localLogRetentionHours: The number of hours for which to retain log backup files on the instance.
Valid values: 0 to 168. The value 0 specifies not to retain log backup files on the instance.
You can retain the default value. Note You must specify this parameter when the BackupPolicyMode
parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.local_log_retention_space
documentation:
:Property:

localLogRetentionSpace: The maximum percentage of space that is allowed to store log backup files on the instance.
If the space usage for log backup files exceeds this percentage, the system deletes earlier
log backup files until the space usage falls below this percentage. Valid values:0 to 50.
You can retain the default value. Note You must specify this parameter when the
BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to LogBackupPolicy.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.log_backup_frequency
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupFrequency: The frequency at which to back up logs. Valid values:
The value LogInterval specifies to back up logs every 30 minutes.
The default value of this parameter is the same as the data backup frequency.
Note The value LogInterval is supported only when the instance runs SQL Server.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.log_backup_local_retention_number
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupLocalRetentionNumber: The number of log backup files that can be retained on the instance.
Default value: 60. Valid values: 6 to 100.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.log_backup_retention_period
documentation:
:Property:

logBackupRetentionPeriod: The number of days for which to retain log backup files. Valid values: 7 to 730. The log backup
retention period cannot be longer than the data backup retention period.Note If you enable the log
backup function, you can specify the log backup retention period. This applies only when the
instance runs MySQL, PostgreSQL, or PPAS.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.maintain_time
documentation: :Property: maintainTime: The period during which the maintenance performs. The format is HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.master_username
documentation: :Property: masterUsername: The master user name for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.master_user_password
documentation: :Property: masterUserPassword: The master password for the database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.master_user_type
documentation:
:Property:

masterUserType: Privilege type of account.
Normal: Common privilege.
Super: High privilege.
Sysadmin: Super privileges (SA) (only supported by SQL Server)
The default value is Normal.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.multi_az
documentation: :Property: multiAz: Specifies if the database instance is a multiple Availability Zone deployment.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.port
documentation: :Property: port: The port of the database service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.preferred_backup_period
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupPeriod: The backup period. Separate multiple values with commas (,). The default value is the original value. Valid values:Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.preferred_backup_time
documentation: :Property: preferredBackupTime: The time when the backup task is performed. Format: yyyy-MM-ddZ-HH:mm:ssZ.Note When the BackupPolicyMode parameter is set to DataBackupPolicy, this parameter is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.private_ip_address
documentation: :Property: privateIpAddress: The private ip for created instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.quantity
documentation: :Property: quantity: The number of instance to be created, default is 1, max number is 99

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.released_keep_policy
documentation:
:Property:

releasedKeepPolicy: The policy used to retain archived backups if the instance is released. Default value: None.
Valid values:
Lastest: Only the last archived backup is retained.
All: All of the archived backups are retained.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.role_arn
documentation: :Property: roleArn: The Alibaba Cloud Resource Name (ARN) provided to the service account of the instance by your Alibaba Cloud account to connect to KMS. You can copy the ARN from the RAM console.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.security_group_id
documentation:
:Property:

securityGroupId: The ID of the ECS security groups.
Each RDS instance can be associated with up to three ECS security groups.
You must separate them with commas (,).
To delete an ECS Security group, leave this parameter empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.serverless_config
documentation: :Property: serverlessConfig: The config of RDS serverless instance. This is required when creating serverless instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.slave_zone_ids
documentation: :Property: slaveZoneIds: List of slave zone ids can specify slave zone ids when creating the high-availability or enterprise edition instance. Meanwhile, VSwitchId needs to pass in the corresponding vswitch id to the slave zone by order. For example, ZoneId = "zone-a" and SlaveZoneIds = ["zone-c", "zone-b"], then the VSwitchId must be "vsw-zone-a,vsw-zone-c,vsw-zone-b".

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.sql_collector_status
documentation:
:Property:

sqlCollectorStatus: Specifies whether to enable or disable the SQL Explorer (SQL audit) feature.
Valid values:Enable | Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.ssl_setting
documentation:
:Property:

sslSetting: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) link setting of the instance. Valid values:
Disabled: Disable SSL
EnabledForPublicConnection: Public connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate. It requires AllocatePublicConnection is true.
EnabledForInnerConnection: Private connection address will be protected by the SSL certificate.
Default value is Disabled.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.storage_auto_scale
documentation: :Property: storageAutoScale: Storage space automatic expansion switch, only supported by MySQL and PostgreSQL

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.storage_threshold
documentation: :Property: storageThreshold: Storage space automatic expansion trigger threshold (percentage)

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.storage_upper_bound
documentation: :Property: storageUpperBound: The total storage space upper limit for automatic storage space expansion, that is, automatic expansion will not cause the total storage space of the instance to exceed this value.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.tags
documentation:
:Property:

tags: The tags of an instance.
You should input the information of the tag with the format of the Key-Value, such as {"key1":"value1","key2":"value2", ... "key5":"value5"}.
At most 20 tags can be specified.
Key
It can be up to 64 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Cannot be a null string.
Value
It can be up to 128 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Can be a null string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.target_dedicated_host_id_for_log
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForLog: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a log instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.target_dedicated_host_id_for_master
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForMaster: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a primary instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.target_dedicated_host_id_for_slave
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForSlave: The ID of the host to which the instance belongs if you create a secondary instance in a host group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The VPC id of created database instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The vSwitch id of created instance. For VPC network, the property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosPrepayDBInstanceProps.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: selected zone to create database instance. You cannot set the ZoneId parameter if the MultiAZ parameter is set to true.

classes.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance._render_properties
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.attr_connection_string
documentation: :Attribute: ConnectionString: DB instance connection url by Intranet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.attr_db_instance_id
documentation: :Attribute: DBInstanceId: The instance id of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.attr_port
documentation: :Attribute: Port: Intranet port of created DB instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.db_instance_class
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceClass: The type of the instance. For more information, see Instance type list. The type of the read-only instance must be no less than that of the master instance. Otherwise, the read-only instance incurs high latency and high load.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.db_instance_id
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceId: The ID of the master instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.db_instance_storage
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceStorage: The storage space of the instance. Value range: 5 to 3000. The value must be a multiple of 5. Unit: GB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.engine_version
documentation: :Property: engineVersion: The version of the database. The database and the master instance must have the same database version. Valid values: 5.6, 5.7, 8.0, 2017_ent, 2019_ent

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: The ID of the zone. You can call the DescribeRegions API operation to view the latest zones.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.auto_renew
documentation:
:Property:

autoRenew: Specifies whether to enable auto-renewal. Valid values: true and false. Note
:Monthly subscription: The auto-renewal cycle is one month.
Annual subscription: The auto-renewal cycle is one year.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.category
documentation:
:Property:

category: The RDS edition of the read-only instance. Valid values:
Basic: Basic Edition.
HighAvailability: High-availability Edition. This is the default value.
AlwaysOn: Cluster Edition.
Finance: Enterprise Edition. This edition is available only on the China site (aliyun.com).

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.db_instance_description
documentation: :Property: dbInstanceDescription: Description of created database instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.db_instance_storage_type
documentation:
:Property:

dbInstanceStorageType: The type of storage media that is used by the instance. Valid values:
local_ssd: local SSDs
cloud_ssd: standard SSDs
cloud_essd: ESSDs of performance level 1 (PL1)
cloud_essd2: ESSDs of PL2
cloud_essd3: ESSDs of PL3

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.dedicated_host_group_id
documentation: :Property: dedicatedHostGroupId: The ID of the dedicated cluster to which the read-only instance belongs. This parameter is valid when you create the read-only instance in a dedicated cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.deletion_protection
documentation: :Property: deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable the release protection feature for the read-only instance. Valid values:- **true**: enables the feature.- **false** (default): disables the feature.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.pay_type
documentation: :Property: payType: The billing method.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.period
documentation:
:Property:

period: The subscription duration. Valid values:
When PeriodType is Month, it could be from 1 to 12, 24, 36, 48, 60.
When PeriodType is Year, it could be from 1 to 5.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.period_type
documentation: :Property: periodType: Charge period for created instances.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.private_ip_address
documentation: :Property: privateIpAddress: The private IP address of the read-only instance. It must be within the IP address range provided by the switch. The system automatically assigns an IP address based on the VPCId and VSwitchId by default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: Resource group id.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.tags
documentation:
:Property:

tags: The tags of an instance.
You should input the information of the tag with the format of the Key-Value, such as {"key1":"value1","key2":"value2", ... "key5":"value5"}.
At most 5 tags can be specified.
Key
It can be up to 64 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Cannot be a null string.
Value
It can be up to 128 characters in length.
Cannot begin with aliyun.
Cannot begin with http:// or https://.
Can be a null string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.target_dedicated_host_id_for_master
documentation: :Property: targetDedicatedHostIdForMaster: The ID of the host on which the primary instance resides. This parameter is valid when you create the read-only instance in a dedicated cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The ID of the VPC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_rds.RosReadOnlyDBInstance.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The ID of the VSwitch.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::RDS::ReadOnlyDBInstance`, which is used to create a read-only ApsaraDB RDS instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `ReadOnlyDBInstance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-rds-readonlydbinstance>
